articles.title: SemiAnalysis 报告：英伟达系统内存支出占比 2026 底 > 30%、2027 > 40%，HBM 单价三年从 16.6 冲向 53 美元/GB
articles.title_en: SemiAnalysis Report: NVIDIA System Memory Share Exceeds 30% by End-2026, 40%+ in 2027; HBM Pricing Tripled from $16.6 to $53/GB
articles.summary: 半导体研究机构 SemiAnalysis 于 2026 年 7 月 4 日发布报告：英伟达系统内存支出占比将在 2026 年底超 30%、2027 年超 40%；超大规模数据中心整体内存占比从当前 8% 跳升至 30%、还有进一步上行空间。Bernstein 同期 Vera Rubin NVL72 单机柜 BOM 分析：总成本约 910 万美元，内存与存储占 320 万（35%），GPU 硅片仅占 43.5%；HBM 109 万 / CPU DRAM 80 万 / NAND 128 万 / 网络 127 万 / 液冷+供电 31 万。HBM 单价三年内从 16.6 美元/GB 涨至 53 美元/GB，DRAM 2026 年翻倍以上；LPDDR5 三年涨三倍，LPDDR4X 4GB Q2 +75%、LPDDR5X 12GB +89%。
articles.summary_en: Semiconductor research house SemiAnalysis released a report on July 4, 2026: memory spend inside NVIDIA systems will exceed 30% of BOM by end-2026 and cross 40% in 2027; hyperscale data-center memory share jumps from 8% to 30% with further upside. Bernstein's parallel BOM analysis of a Vera Rubin NVL72 rack: total ~$9.1M, memory and storage $3.2M (35%), GPU silicon only 43.5%. Breakdown: HBM $1.09M, CPU DRAM $0.80M, NAND $1.28M, networking $1.27M, liquid cooling + power $0.31M. HBM per-GB pricing has tripled from $16.6 to $53 over three years; DRAM prices will more than double in 2026; LPDDR5 has tripled in three years, LPDDR4X 4GB is +75% and LPDDR5X 12GB is +89% in Q2 2026.
articles.source: SemiAnalysis 2026-07-04 报告 / Bernstein / TrendForce / SigmaIntell / 华尔街见闻 / 财经头条 2026-07-04
articles.source_en: SemiAnalysis 2026-07-04 report / Bernstein / TrendForce / SigmaIntell / Wall Street CN / Cai Jing Tou Tiao 2026-07-04
articles.content: SemiAnalysis 报告的两个数字点燃了产业分析圈：30% 与 40%——分别对应 2026 年底与 2027 年英伟达系统内存支出占比。Bernstein 的机柜级 BOM 印证了这份宏观判断：Vera Rubin NVL72 机柜内存与存储合计 320 万美元 / 35%，GPU 硅片本身只占 43.5%。这份报告揭示了一个更结构化的信号：AI 基础设施的成本重心正在从 GPU 硅片本身向 HBM、DRAM、NAND、PCB、铜互连整体供应链迁移。英伟达因为享有存储原厂 VVP 特权定价（大约低于市场 30-40%），得以在这份成本压力里比 AMD 等竞争对手更从容——AMD 单卡 HBM 用量更大、又没有 VVP，是这一轮涨价里结构性最脆弱的一方。三星 DRAM 平均售价环比涨幅超 90%、SK 海力士 HBM 2026 全年产能已提前锁定、美光刚公布财报是 SemiAnalysis 上调预测的直接催化剂——存储三巨头进入结构性高毛利周期，市场共识不会早于 2028 缓解。
articles.content_en: SemiAnalysis's two numbers ignited industry-analyst circles: 30% and 40% - NVIDIA system memory spend share at end-2026 and during 2027. Bernstein's rack-level BOM validates the macro call: Vera Rubin NVL72 memory + storage totals $3.2M / 35%, GPU silicon only 43.5%. The deeper signal: AI infrastructure cost gravity is migrating from GPU silicon to HBM, DRAM, NAND, PCB and copper interconnect. NVIDIA enjoys VVP (very very preferential) pricing from memory OEMs (estimated 30-40% below market), letting it weather the pressure more comfortably than AMD - AMD carries more HBM per chip, doesn't get VVP, and is structurally the most exposed loser this cycle. Samsung's DRAM ASP jumped 90%+ sequentially; SK Hynix has locked in most 2026 HBM capacity; Micron's latest print catalyzed SemiAnalysis's upward revision. The three memory OEMs enter a structural high-margin cycle - consensus is no relief before 2028.
key_points: 英伟达系统内存占比 2026 底 > 30%、2027 > 40%
超大规模数据中心内存占比 8% → 30%
Vera Rubin NVL72 单机柜 910 万美元，内存存储 320 万（35%）
HBM 单价三年 16.6 → 53 美元/GB（翻三倍）
英伟达 VVP 特权强化护城河，AMD 结构性受伤

Hyperscale data center memory share 8% → 30%

articles.title: Microsoft Frontier Company 成立：25 亿美元投入 6000 名专家，重构商业业务 AI 化
articles.title_en: Microsoft Frontier Company Formed: $2.5B and 6,000 Experts to Rebuild Commercial Business on AI
articles.summary: 微软于 2026 年 7 月 2 日正式宣布成立 Microsoft Frontier Company——一个专注于「AI 原生商业业务」的独立公司，初始投入约 25 亿美元（约合人民币 170 亿元）、6000 名专家团队。负责人为 Rodrigo Kede Lima，向微软商业业务 CEO Judson Althoff 汇报。Frontier Company 的核心使命：把微软 Dynamics 365、Power Platform、Copilot 等商业业务全部重构成「AI 原生」形态，为大客户提供从流程到 Agent 的完整 AI 化解决方案。这也是微软在 AI 商业化路径上第二次做大规模组织重组——第一次是 2023 年成立微软 AI 部门；第二次即本次 Frontier Company。
articles.summary_en: On July 2, 2026 Microsoft officially formed Microsoft Frontier Company - a standalone entity focused on 'AI-native commercial business,' with initial funding of $2.5B (~17B RMB) and a 6,000-expert team. Rodrigo Kede Lima leads, reporting to Microsoft's commercial-business CEO Judson Althoff. Frontier Company's core mission: rebuild Microsoft Dynamics 365, Power Platform and Copilot business lines as 'AI-native,' offering enterprise customers end-to-end AI transformation from workflows to Agents. This is Microsoft's second large-scale AI reorg after the 2023 formation of the Microsoft AI division.
articles.source: 华尔街见闻 2026-07-02 / 36 氪 2026-07-03 / 澎湃新闻 2026-07-03 / Microsoft 官方新闻稿
articles.source_en: Wall Street CN 2026-07-02 / 36Kr 2026-07-03 / The Paper 2026-07-03 / Microsoft Official Press Release
articles.content: 微软成立 Frontier Company 的战略含义超过单一业务重组：它意味着微软承认「Copilot 是加装、不是重构」的时代已经结束——真正的下一阶段商业价值，在于「从零开始设计的 AI 原生业务系统」。Rodrigo Kede Lima 之所以被选中，源于他过去 10 年在 IBM、SAP 等企业级软件公司的深耕经验——微软要的是一位既懂大企业客户流程、又能推动组织变革的执行者。6000 名专家的团队规模相当于一个中型 SaaS 公司的整体人力，这份投入承诺意味着微软准备用 3-5 年重塑其商业业务的核心资产。对市场的直接影响是：SAP、Salesforce、Oracle 等传统企业软件公司未来 3 年将面对来自「AI 原生 + 微软规模 + Frontier 品牌」三重叠加的竞争压力，而不仅仅是 Copilot 插件级别的挑战。
articles.content_en: The strategic weight of Microsoft's Frontier Company exceeds a single business reorg: it acknowledges that the 'Copilot-as-bolt-on' era is over - the next phase of commercial value lies in 'AI-native business systems designed from scratch.' Rodrigo Kede Lima was chosen for his decade at IBM and SAP - Microsoft wanted a leader who understands enterprise-customer workflows and can drive organizational change. A 6,000-expert team is the headcount of a mid-size SaaS company - the commitment signals Microsoft plans a 3-5 year reshape of its core commercial assets. Direct market impact: SAP, Salesforce, Oracle and other traditional enterprise-software vendors will face triple-stacked competitive pressure over three years - 'AI-native + Microsoft scale + Frontier brand' - not merely Copilot plug-in level challenges.

articles.title: 快手可灵 AI 首轮融资近 30 亿美元、估值 180 亿美元：BAT 罕见同台入局
articles.title_en: Kuaishou Kling AI Closes ~$3B First Round at $18B Valuation: Rare BAT Co-Investment
articles.summary: 快手旗下 AI 视频生成产品「可灵 AI」于 2026 年 7 月上旬完成首轮融资，融资金额接近 30 亿美元、估值约 180 亿美元——是国内 2026 年以来单笔金额最大的 AI 公司融资。投资方名单里出现了罕见的组合：百度、阿里、腾讯 BAT 三家同台入股，加上高瓴、红杉中国、Coatue 等一线财务投资方。可灵 AI 目前是国内视频生成赛道的头部产品，已积累超过 300 万 API 客户，2026 年上半年收入超过 6 亿元人民币。这轮融资的估值倍数（约 15 倍 P/S）在国内 AI 应用层公司里属于最高档位。
articles.summary_en: Kuaishou's AI video generation product Kling AI closed its first funding round in early July 2026 at nearly $3B, valuing the unit at ~$18B - the largest single AI-company round in China this year. The cap table features a rare combination: Baidu, Alibaba and Tencent (BAT) all as co-investors, alongside Hillhouse, Sequoia China, Coatue and other tier-1 financial LPs. Kling is China's leading video-generation product, with 3M+ API customers and 600M+ RMB in H1 2026 revenue. The ~15x P/S valuation multiple is at the top end for China's AI-application-layer companies.
articles.source_en: 36Kr 2026-07-05 / Wall Street CN 2026-07-06 / The Paper 2026-07-06 / Kuaishou Official / Caixin Weekly
articles.content: 可灵 AI 的融资结构里最值得注意的是 BAT 同台——百度、阿里、腾讯三家在同一个 AI 应用公司的同一轮融资里出现，这在国内 AI 投资史上前所未见。三家共同入股的商业逻辑分成两条：其一，视频生成是下一代内容生态的战略入口，三家都不想在这个赛道缺席；其二，快手作为国内视频内容分发的头部平台，短期内不会做纯粹的封闭生态，向 BAT 开放战略投资等于把可灵 AI 变成了「多方共同利益体」。180 亿美元估值背后的核心指标是 300 万 API 客户 + 6 亿人民币上半年收入——按年化 12 亿计算，估值对应 15 倍 P/S，在国内 AI 应用层里属于头部溢价。这一轮融资也意味着国内视频生成赛道进入「Kling vs Sora 2 vs Veo 3」的三足鼎立阶段——OpenAI Sora 2 与 Google Veo 3 是可灵在海外市场的直接对手，而中国国内可灵基本处于头部锁定地位。
articles.content_en: The most notable feature of Kling's cap table is the BAT co-investment - Baidu, Alibaba and Tencent participating in the same round of the same AI application company, unprecedented in China's AI investing history. Two commercial rationales: (1) video generation is the strategic gateway to the next-gen content ecosystem - none of the three can afford to be absent; (2) as China's leading video distribution platform, Kuaishou won't build a purely closed ecosystem short-term - opening strategic investment to BAT converts Kling into a 'multi-party interest coalition.' Behind the $18B valuation are 3M API customers + 600M RMB H1 revenue - annualizing to 1.2B RMB, that's ~15x P/S, top-tier premium in China's AI application layer. This round also marks China's video-generation race entering a three-way standoff: Kling vs Sora 2 vs Veo 3 - with OpenAI's Sora 2 and Google's Veo 3 as Kling's overseas rivals, while Kling essentially locks in China's domestic top position.

articles.title: 建滔积层板一度重挫 18%：SemiAnalysis 曝光英伟达 Kyber NVL144 遇 PCB 制造瓶颈
articles.title_en: Kingboard Laminates Falls 18% Intraday: SemiAnalysis Exposes PCB Bottleneck in NVIDIA's Kyber NVL144
articles.summary: 2026 年 7 月 6 日星期一，PCB 厂商建滔积层板在香港股市一度重挫 18%，引发亚洲印刷电路板板块集体震荡。震源来自 SemiAnalysis 同日在 X 平台的发布——英伟达新一代 Kyber NVL144 服务器机架遭遇制造瓶颈，问题集中在配套的印刷电路板与铜互连组件上。Kyber NVL144 是英伟达 GB300 / Vera Rubin 系列的下一代机架标准，从 NVL72 升级到 NVL144 意味着单柜 GPU 数量翻倍、PCB 层数与铜连接器密度大幅提升。原本 PCB 供应商预期 2026 下半年 Kyber NVL144 量产爬坡会大幅受益，SemiAnalysis 的报告直接把预期从「量产爬坡」改成「量产延迟」——建滔积层板作为亚洲 PCB 产业链核心一环首当其冲。
articles.summary_en: On Monday July 6, 2026, PCB maker Kingboard Laminates fell as much as 18% in Hong Kong trading, triggering a broader Asian PCB sector selloff. The trigger: SemiAnalysis's same-day X post revealing that NVIDIA's next-gen Kyber NVL144 rack has hit a manufacturing bottleneck centered on printed-circuit boards and copper interconnects. Kyber NVL144 is the next-gen rack standard succeeding NVL72 in NVIDIA's GB300 / Vera Rubin roadmap - doubling GPUs per rack from 72 to 144 substantially raises PCB layer count and copper-connector density. PCB suppliers had expected H2 2026 to be a Kyber NVL144 ramp-up beneficiary; SemiAnalysis's report reframed the ramp from 'volume ramp' to 'delayed ramp' - Kingboard, as Asia's core PCB anchor, took the direct hit.
articles.source: SemiAnalysis 2026-07-06 X 帖 / 华尔街见闻 2026-07-06 / 财新 2026-07-06 / 香港股市数据
articles.source_en: SemiAnalysis 2026-07-06 X post / Wall Street CN 2026-07-06 / Caixin 2026-07-06 / Hong Kong stock exchange
articles.content: 建滔积层板一日 -18% 是这一轮 AI 供应链余震的最尖锐信号。这场震荡透露出一个更深层结论：AI 基础设施的成本压力不仅在存储原厂端反映，也在 PCB、铜互连、光互连、液冷等下游环节反复放大。单机柜从 300kW 跃升到 1MW、单卡内存从 80GB 到 288GB、机架 GPU 数量从 72 到 144 再向 300 演进——每一步都会同步推高 PCB 层数、铜互连密度、液冷面积、供电容量。任何一个环节出现瓶颈，都会引发整条供应链的股价震荡。建滔的股价短期反弹将取决于 SemiAnalysis 后续披露 Kyber 良率恢复的确切时间线，但从产业中期视角看，PCB 层数升级本身仍是一个结构性利好——只是节奏被推迟了而已。
articles.content_en: Kingboard's single-day -18% is the sharpest signal in this round of AI supply-chain aftershock. The tremor reveals a deeper conclusion: AI infrastructure cost pressure isn't confined to the memory OEM side - it amplifies through PCB, copper interconnect, optical interconnect, liquid cooling and beyond. Rack power from 300kW to 1MW, per-card HBM from 80GB to 288GB, GPUs per rack from 72 to 144 to 300+ - each step simultaneously raises PCB layer count, copper density, cooling surface, and power capacity. Any single link hitting a bottleneck triggers a supply-chain-wide equity re-rating. Kingboard's short-term rebound depends on SemiAnalysis's next disclosure on Kyber yield recovery, but on a medium-term view PCB layer-count upgrades are still a structural tailwind - just with delayed pacing.

articles.title: 俄罗斯 Sber 开源 GigaChat 3.5 Ultra：MoE + 线性注意力架构
articles.title_en: Russia's Sber Open-Sources GigaChat 3.5 Ultra: MoE + Linear Attention Architecture
articles.summary: 俄罗斯最大银行 Sber 于 2026 年 7 月 6 日开源 GigaChat 3.5 Ultra——一款采用 MoE（混合专家）+ 线性注意力（Linear Attention）双重架构的大模型。这是欧洲 / 独联体地区目前最先进的开源大模型之一，也是俄罗斯 AI 主权战略下的一个重要里程碑——GigaChat 系列此前一直以私有闭源为主。GigaChat 3.5 Ultra 在俄语 benchmark 上超过 GPT-4o 与 Claude Sonnet；英文能力接近国际二线开源模型水平。俄罗斯官方公告强调这次开源是「面向国际学术社区的技术贡献」。
articles.summary_en: Russia's largest bank Sber open-sourced GigaChat 3.5 Ultra on July 6, 2026 — a large model combining MoE (mixture of experts) with linear-attention architecture. It's currently one of the most advanced open-source models in Europe / CIS region, and a key milestone in Russia's AI sovereignty strategy - the GigaChat series had historically been closed-source. GigaChat 3.5 Ultra outperforms GPT-4o and Claude Sonnet on Russian-language benchmarks; English capability approaches the international second-tier open-source level. Russia's official announcement frames the release as a 'technical contribution to the international academic community.'
articles.source: 微博每日 AI 简讯 2026-07-06 / Sber 官方公告 / TechCrunch 2026-07-06 / HuggingFace GigaChat 模型卡
articles.source_en: Weibo Daily AI Brief 2026-07-06 / Sber Official / TechCrunch 2026-07-06 / HuggingFace GigaChat Model Card
articles.content: GigaChat 3.5 Ultra 的技术亮点是 MoE + 线性注意力的双重架构：线性注意力允许模型在长上下文（>128K）场景下拿到接近 O(n) 而非 O(n²) 的计算复杂度，是继 Mamba、RWKV 之后又一次线性注意力路线的大规模工程实践。对全球 AI 开源生态而言，GigaChat 3.5 Ultra 的价值主要在两点：其一是俄语 / 斯拉夫语系语料的稀缺性——Sber 掌握着俄罗斯搜索、金融、电商三大数据源；其二是线性注意力在生产环境的工程验证——这份代码将成为全球线性注意力研究的基准。俄罗斯 AI 主权战略的推进力度是外界低估的——从 2024 年的 GigaChat 1.0 到 2026 年 7 月的 GigaChat 3.5 Ultra，俄罗斯用 2 年时间把 AI 主权从「消费级」提升到了「工业级 + 开源」。这份开源同时向国际学术社区释放两个信号：其一，俄罗斯技术不孤立；其二，俄罗斯希望在国际 AI 治理中拿到席位。
articles.content_en: GigaChat 3.5 Ultra's technical highlight is the MoE + linear-attention dual architecture: linear attention brings computational complexity closer to O(n) rather than O(n²) in long-context (>128K) scenarios - the largest production-grade engineering deployment of linear attention since Mamba and RWKV. For the global open-source ecosystem, GigaChat 3.5 Ultra's value lies in two dimensions: (1) the scarcity of Russian / Slavic-language corpora - Sber controls Russia's search, financial and e-commerce data sources; (2) production-grade validation of linear attention - the codebase will become a benchmark for global linear-attention research. Russia's AI sovereignty push has been under-estimated externally - from GigaChat 1.0 in 2024 to GigaChat 3.5 Ultra in July 2026, Russia lifted its AI sovereignty from 'consumer grade' to 'industrial-grade + open source' in two years. The open-source release simultaneously signals: (1) Russian tech isn't isolated; (2) Russia seeks a seat at the international AI governance table.

articles.title: 国务院常务会议部署 AI 发展四大方向：智算总规模达 188 万 P，AI 核心产业 1.2 万亿元
articles.title_en: China State Council Deploys Four AI Directions: Compute Capacity 1.88M P, Core AI Industry Hits 1.2 Trillion RMB
articles.summary: 2026 年 6 月 29 日国务院常务会议部署 AI 发展四大方向：加快关键核心技术攻关、加大基础设施建设、深化行业应用融合、完善治理体系。会议披露关键数据：全国智算总规模达 188 万 P（1P = 1 Petaflops），AI 核心产业规模已突破 1.2 万亿元人民币。相关配套：具身智能 2026 年上半年融资 935 亿元、322 笔（+137% YoY）；宇树科技 IPO 注册用时 104 天获批。政策同时明确加强 AI 治理、数据安全与算法监管等重点方向。
articles.summary_en: On June 29, 2026 China's State Council deployed four AI development directions: accelerate key-tech breakthroughs, expand infrastructure, deepen vertical application integration, and improve governance. Key data disclosed: national compute capacity reaches 1.88M P (1P = 1 Petaflops), core AI industry has crossed 1.2 trillion RMB. Related supporting data: embodied intelligence H1 2026 raised 93.5B RMB across 322 rounds (+137% YoY); Unitree Robotics obtained IPO registration approval in 104 days. Policy also emphasized AI governance, data security, and algorithm oversight.
articles.source_en: Xinhua 2026-06-29 / The Paper 2026-06-30 / China Securities Journal 2026-07-01 / Caixin 2026-07-02
articles.content: 国常会 6 月 29 日的部署，是过去 12 个月里国内 AI 政策最系统性的一次表达。188 万 P 的智算总规模，意味着国内已建成全球第二大智算基础设施（美国第一）；1.2 万亿元的 AI 核心产业规模，把国内 AI 从「新兴赛道」正式定位到「国民经济核心产业」的层级。具身智能上半年融资 935 亿元 / 322 笔（+137% YoY）是最直接的资本反馈——机器人本体、伺服、传感器、AI 大脑等赛道全线密集融资。宇树科技 IPO 注册 104 天获批，创下 A 股机器人企业最快过会纪录，说明监管层对硬科技 IPO 的开闸支持。政策同步强调 AI 治理与数据安全，是对海外「AI 安全法案」的国内呼应。对企业侧的直接影响：政策明确后，未来 12 个月的资金流向会更集中于「智算 + 具身智能 + 大模型基础设施」三大板块。
articles.content_en: The State Council's June 29 deployment is the most systematic AI policy expression in the past 12 months. 1.88M P of national compute means China has built the world's second-largest AI compute infrastructure (US first); 1.2 trillion RMB in core AI industry formally elevates domestic AI from 'emerging sector' to 'core national economy pillar.' Embodied intelligence's H1 fundraising of 93.5B RMB across 322 rounds (+137% YoY) is the most direct capital-market feedback - robot bodies, servos, sensors and AI brains have seen synchronized dense funding. Unitree Robotics' 104-day IPO registration is the fastest A-share robotics IPO ever, indicating regulator support for hardtech listings. Policy simultaneously emphasized AI governance and data security - a domestic echo of overseas 'AI safety act' movements. Direct implication for enterprises: with policy clarified, next-12-month capital flows will concentrate on the 'compute + embodied intelligence + LLM infrastructure' triangle.

articles.title: Anthropic 与三星洽谈 2nm 代工自研 AI 芯片：Claude 芯片自主化的第一步
articles.title_en: Anthropic in Talks with Samsung for 2nm Foundry on Custom AI Chip: First Step Toward Claude Silicon Autonomy
articles.summary: 2026 年 7 月上旬多家外媒披露，Anthropic 正与三星电子洽谈基于三星 2nm 工艺代工其自研 AI 芯片。这将是 Anthropic 首次尝试脱离 NVIDIA 硬件依赖、走「自研+代工」路线。三星 2nm 工艺已进入量产阶段，Anthropic 的芯片主要面向推理场景，目标是把 Claude 系列模型的推理成本相对 NVIDIA GPU 降低 30-40%。Anthropic 与三星的合作预计需要 12-18 个月完成首批流片，2027 年下半年可能是首次商用节点。这一动作同时反映 Anthropic 对 NVIDIA VVP 特权定价结构性劣势的应对。
articles.summary_en: In early July 2026 multiple international outlets reported that Anthropic is in talks with Samsung to fab its custom AI chip on Samsung's 2nm process. This would be Anthropic's first attempt to break its NVIDIA hardware dependency via a 'design + foundry' route. Samsung's 2nm process has entered mass production; Anthropic's chip mainly targets inference workloads, aiming to reduce Claude-model inference cost 30-40% versus NVIDIA GPUs. The partnership is expected to take 12-18 months to first tape-out, with H2 2027 as a possible commercial deployment window. The move also reflects Anthropic's response to the structural disadvantage of NVIDIA's VVP preferential pricing regime.
articles.source: 微博每日 AI 简讯 2026-07-06 / Reuters 2026-07-05 / The Information 2026-07-06 / Anthropic 官方无回应
articles.source_en: Weibo Daily AI Brief 2026-07-06 / Reuters 2026-07-05 / The Information 2026-07-06 / Anthropic (no comment)
articles.content: Anthropic 自研 AI 芯片的动作，本质是应对结构性劣势的必然选择。在 NVIDIA 享受存储原厂 VVP 特权定价的当下，Anthropic 作为规模明显小于 OpenAI 与 Google 的第三家大模型公司，长期面对「同等 GPU、更贵的实际成本」的处境。自研 + 三星 2nm 代工的组合，是 Anthropic 尝试从底层控制推理成本的第一次真正大动作。这个策略在 AI 大厂里不是先例——OpenAI 早已与 Broadcom 合作自研推理芯片、Meta 有自研 MTIA、Google 长期用 TPU、Amazon 有 Trainium/Inferentia。Anthropic 是最后一家进场的头部大模型公司，选三星而非台积电作为代工方，一方面是 TSMC 产能紧张、另一方面是三星在 2nm 上给 Anthropic 拿到了比 TSMC 更优惠的产能配额。这份合作签成后，AI 大模型公司的自研芯片格局将变成「OpenAI/Broadcom + Google/TPU + Meta/MTIA + Anthropic/Samsung + Amazon/Trainium」五强并列。
articles.content_en: Anthropic's custom-silicon move is essentially a forced response to structural disadvantage. With NVIDIA enjoying memory-OEM VVP preferential pricing, Anthropic - visibly smaller than OpenAI and Google - has long faced 'same GPU, higher effective cost.' The design + Samsung 2nm foundry combination is Anthropic's first serious attempt to control inference cost at the substrate level. This isn't precedent-setting - OpenAI already partners with Broadcom on inference silicon, Meta runs MTIA, Google has long used TPU, Amazon runs Trainium/Inferentia. Anthropic is the last of the top-tier foundation-model companies to make the move. Choosing Samsung over TSMC reflects TSMC capacity constraints and Samsung's willingness to offer Anthropic more preferential 2nm allocations. Once signed, the custom-silicon landscape becomes a five-way play: OpenAI/Broadcom + Google/TPU + Meta/MTIA + Anthropic/Samsung + Amazon/Trainium.

hero.title: Meta Compute 官宣「算力对外租赁」、John Jumper 从 DeepMind 转会 Anthropic、Claude Code 被阿里全员卸载——AI 产业的三张切片同一周落地
hero.title_en: Meta Compute Announces GPU Rental, John Jumper Defects from DeepMind to Anthropic, Alibaba Orders Full Uninstall of Claude Code — Three Cross-Sections of AI Industry Landed in One Week
hero.source: 彭博社 / 36 氪 / 华尔街见闻 / 澎湃新闻 / 凤凰网 / 财新 / 麻省理工科技评论 / 都市快报 / 观察者网 / 金融界
hero.source_en: Bloomberg / 36Kr / Wall Street CN / The Paper / iFeng / Caixin / MIT Technology Review / Metropolis Express / Guancha / Financial World
hero.summary: 7 月 1 日彭博社首爆 Meta 内部代号「Meta Compute」的云基础设施业务——把富余的 AI 算力对外出租，同时开放 Llama、Muse Spark 等模型的 API 调用；Meta 当日股价 +8.8%、市值涨 1270 亿美元，CoreWeave -13.92%、Nebius -17.01%。6 月 19 日 AlphaFold 主创、2024 年诺贝尔化学奖得主 John Jumper 宣布离开 DeepMind 9 年入职 Anthropic；6 月 30 日 Anthropic 在旧金山 AI for Science 事件上正式发布 Claude Science——面向科研人员整合 60+ 数据库的 AI 工作台，同步启动内部药物发现项目聚焦被忽视疾病。7 月 3 日阿里巴巴内部下发通知：因 Claude Code 被曝内置基于时区+中国域名黑名单的隐蔽检测机制，Anthropic 全系产品于 7 月 10 日起全员卸载，Qoder 作为替代方案。三件事同一周落地——算力供给方模式、顶级人才迁徙、地缘合规双向收紧——AI 商业化临界点的三张切片同步到位。
hero.summary_en: On July 1, Bloomberg first broke Meta's internal "Meta Compute" cloud infrastructure play — renting spare AI compute externally while offering API access to Llama and Muse Spark. Meta rallied 8.8% that day (+$127B market cap), while CoreWeave dropped 13.92% and Nebius plunged 17.01%. On June 19, AlphaFold co-creator and 2024 Nobel Chemistry laureate John Jumper announced his departure from DeepMind after nine years to join Anthropic. On June 30, Anthropic officially released Claude Science at its San Francisco AI for Science event — a research workbench integrating 60+ preconfigured databases, alongside an internal drug-discovery project focused on neglected diseases. On July 3, Alibaba issued an internal directive: due to Claude Code's exposed covert detection mechanism based on system timezone and a Chinese-domain blacklist, all Anthropic products must be uninstalled by July 10, with in-house Qoder as replacement. Three events in one week — supply-side model, top-tier talent migration, geopolitical compliance tightening — three synchronized cross-sections of the AI commercialization inflection.

articles.title: Meta Compute 官宣：Meta 从算力买家转身当卖家，股价当日 +8.8% 市值增 1270 亿美元、CoreWeave -13.92%
articles.title_en: Meta Compute Officially Launched: Meta Turns from Buyer to Seller, Stock +8.8% ($127B Market Cap), CoreWeave -13.92%
articles.summary: 2026 年 7 月 1 日，彭博社独家披露 Meta 正在推进代号「Meta Compute」的云基础设施业务——两条路径同步：一是把 Llama、Muse Spark 等模型开放给企业客户按 Token 用量收费，对标 AWS Bedrock；二是把 GPU 集群按小时租出去，对标 CoreWeave。消息一出 Meta 股价当日大涨 8.8%、市值增加约 1270 亿美元；CoreWeave 大跌 13.92%、Nebius 暴跌 17.01%、美光、闪迪跌超 10%。Meta 2026 年资本支出指引 1250-1450 亿美元、较 2025 年 722 亿几乎翻倍，一季度末累计承诺 1829 亿美元用于 AI 基础设施。Meta Compute 由基础设施负责人 Santosh Janardhan、Meta 超级智能实验室高管 Daniel Gross 以及总裁 Dina Powell McCormick 共同领导。
articles.summary_en: On July 1, 2026, Bloomberg exclusively revealed Meta's cloud infrastructure play codenamed "Meta Compute" — two parallel tracks: (1) opening Llama and Muse Spark via API on a token-usage basis, benchmarking AWS Bedrock; (2) hourly GPU cluster rental, benchmarking CoreWeave. Meta rose 8.8% that day (+~$127B market cap); CoreWeave dropped 13.92%, Nebius plunged 17.01%, Micron and SanDisk each fell over 10%. Meta's 2026 capex guidance is $125-145B, nearly double the 2025 actual $72.2B. As of Q1 end, cumulative AI infrastructure commitments totaled $182.9B. Meta Compute is co-led by infrastructure head Santosh Janardhan, Meta Superintelligence Labs AI executive Daniel Gross, and President Dina Powell McCormick.
articles.source_en: Bloomberg 2026-07-01 / 36Kr 2026-07-03 / Wall Street CN 2026-07-02 / The Paper 2026-07-03 / Cai Jing Tou Tiao 2026-07-02
articles.content: 扎克伯格 5 月股东会上的原话是「几乎每周都有外部公司联系我们，希望我们推出 API 服务，或询问能否购买我们的算力，甚至愿意支付高于我们采购成本的价格」——两个月后这句话变成了 Meta Compute 项目。Jefferies 数据显示 Meta 数据中心内部利用率约 65%、35% 处于闲置状态；训练完成后的推理集群利用率通常从 100% 骤降至 30-50%。Meta Compute 的战略意义远大于单一业务线：昔日金主 CoreWeave（Meta 累计签署 352 亿美元合同）秒变最大竞争对手；Bernstein 分析师 Madison Rezaei 指出，仅 Meta 一家的订单就占 CoreWeave 在手订单超三分之一，加上微软约 140 亿美元订单，「CoreWeave 将近一半在手订单未来续约时都将来自已经成为直接竞争对手的客户」。前车之鉴：SpaceX Colossus 已把 300 兆瓦、22 万块 GPU 租给 Anthropic（180 天租约）；Google 从 2026-10 至 2029-6 每月 9.2 亿美元向 SpaceX 租约 11 万 GPU。美银证券预测每 GW 算力对外变现空间 100-150 亿美元，Meta 手握 10 GW 级容量，年化收入空间超千亿美元。这是 AI 头部厂商第一次从「单纯算力买家」升级为「供需双重角色」。
articles.content_en: Zuckerberg's exact words at the May shareholder meeting were: "Almost every week outside companies approach us wanting an API service, or asking if they can buy our compute — even willing to pay above our procurement cost." Two months later that sentence became Meta Compute. Jefferies data shows Meta's data center internal utilization at ~65%, with 35% sitting idle; post-training inference clusters typically fall from 100% to 30-50% utilization. Meta Compute's strategic weight far exceeds one business line: former backer CoreWeave (Meta's $35.2B cumulative contract counterparty) instantly becomes its largest competitor. Bernstein analyst Madison Rezaei notes Meta orders alone exceed one third of CoreWeave's backlog; add Microsoft's ~$14B and "nearly half of CoreWeave's backlog will renew from customers who are now direct competitors." Precedents: SpaceX Colossus has already rented 300 MW / 220,000 GPUs to Anthropic on 180-day terms; Google will pay SpaceX $920M/month from Oct 2026 to Jun 2029 for ~110,000 GPUs. BofA models $10-15B monetization space per GW; Meta's 10+ GW capacity implies over $100B annual revenue headroom. This is the first time a top AI player upgrades from "pure compute buyer" to "dual buyer-seller."

articles.title: John Jumper 从 DeepMind 转会 Anthropic：诺奖得主离开 9 年老东家，AlphaFold 主创改押 Claude Science
articles.title_en: John Jumper Defects to Anthropic: Nobel Laureate Leaves DeepMind After 9 Years, AlphaFold Co-Creator Bets on Claude Science
articles.summary: 2026 年 6 月 19 日，John Jumper 在 X 平台发文宣布离开 Google DeepMind 9 年入职 Anthropic。Jumper 是 AlphaFold 2 的核心架构者、2024 年诺贝尔化学奖得主（与 Demis Hassabis 共同获奖）。他在 AlphaFold 2 中引入的 SE(3) 等变性、Evoformer、残基气体初始化、Recycling、FAPE 损失函数等设计，被消融实验证明等效于把训练数据规模放大约 100 倍。同期从 DeepMind 离职的还有 Jonas Adler、Alexander Pritzel 等 AlphaFold 核心成员——一并落地 Anthropic。此前 4 月 Anthropic 以 4 亿美元收购 8 个月大的初创 Coefficient Bio；6 月 30 日 Anthropic 在旧金山正式发布 Claude Science。Anthropic 明确把生命科学作为下一步战略主线。
articles.summary_en: On June 19, 2026, John Jumper announced on X his departure from Google DeepMind after 9 years to join Anthropic. Jumper is the core architect of AlphaFold 2 and shared the 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry with Demis Hassabis. His signature designs in AlphaFold 2 — SE(3) equivariance, Evoformer, residue-gas initialization, Recycling, FAPE loss — were shown in ablation studies to be equivalent to scaling up training data ~100x. Fellow AlphaFold core members Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel also left DeepMind for Anthropic. In April, Anthropic acquired 8-month-old startup Coefficient Bio for $400M; on June 30, Anthropic formally released Claude Science in San Francisco. Anthropic is explicitly making life sciences its next strategic pillar.
articles.source_en: John Jumper X 2026-06-19 / Zhi Xiang Xin Zhi 2026-06-24 / MIT Technology Review 2026-07-01 / Caixin 2026-06-27 / zeronoise.ai 2026-06-20 / Financial World 2026-07-01
articles.content: Jumper 的转会不是普通「明星跳槽」——它意味着 AI 生命科学赛道的技术定义权正在从 DeepMind 平移到 Anthropic。AlphaFold 2 的成功来自架构层面的信息效率革命，而不是算力堆叠——消融实验显示 SE(3) 等变性一项就在 30 分总分中贡献 2.5 分。这套设计哲学对当下大模型「靠 Scaling 硬堆」的路径提出了另一种范式：正确的归纳偏置比 100 倍数据更有效。Jumper 在 Anthropic 会与生命科学负责人 Eric Kauderer-Abrams（10 个月前从诊断技术企业加入）联手，主导 Claude Science 的架构演进方向。Anthropic 的战略布局清晰：4 月 4 亿美元收购 Coefficient Bio 拿到湿实验室能力、6 月 30 日发布 Claude Science 整合 60+ 数据库、7 月引入 Jumper——五年时间把自己从「聊天机器人」定位为生命科学 AI 伙伴。当前 Anthropic 估值 9650 亿美元、ARR 300-420 亿美元，公司账面充裕。诺华 CEO Vas Narasimhan 公开表示 AI 有望把药物研发周期从 12 年压缩到 7-8 年、成功率从 8% 升到 16%——这是万亿美元级市场，也是 Anthropic 敢用旗舰级人才押注的原因。
articles.content_en: Jumper's move isn't a routine "star hire" — it means the technical definition of AI life sciences is shifting from DeepMind to Anthropic. AlphaFold 2's success came from architecture-level information-efficiency innovation, not compute scaling — ablations showed SE(3) equivariance alone contributed 2.5 points of the 30-point total. This philosophy proposes a contrarian paradigm to today's "scale hard" wisdom: correct inductive bias beats 100x more data. Jumper will partner with Eric Kauderer-Abrams (Anthropic's life-sciences head, 10 months in from a diagnostics venture) to steer Claude Science's architecture. Anthropic's strategic layout is clear: April $400M Coefficient Bio acquisition brought wet-lab capability; June 30 Claude Science integrated 60+ databases; July Jumper arrives — five years to reposition from "chatbot vendor" to "life-science AI partner." With Anthropic valued at $96.5B and ARR at $30-42B, cash is not the constraint. Novartis CEO Vas Narasimhan publicly says AI could compress drug R&D from 12 years to 7-8 years, raising success rates from 8% to 16% — a trillion-dollar market and the reason Anthropic is willing to bet flagship-level talent.
key_points: 6 月 19 日 Jumper 在 X 发文离开 DeepMind 9 年入职 Anthropic
2024 年诺贝尔化学奖得主、AlphaFold 2 核心架构者
AF2 消融实验：SE(3) 等变性等效 100 倍数据
同期 Jonas Adler、Alexander Pritzel 一并入职 Anthropic
Anthropic 估值 9650 亿美元、ARR 300-420 亿美元

2024 Nobel Chemistry laureate, AlphaFold 2 core architect
AF2 ablation: SE(3) equivariance equivalent to 100x data
Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel joined Anthropic in the same wave
Anthropic valuation $96.5B, ARR $30-42B

articles.title: 阿里巴巴内部通知 7 月 10 日起全员卸载 Claude Code：Anthropic 承认 4 月起植入基于时区+147 中国域名的隐蔽检测
articles.title_en: Alibaba Orders Full Uninstall of Claude Code by July 10: Anthropic Admits Timezone + 147-Chinese-Domain Covert Detection Since April
articles.summary: 2026 年 7 月 3 日，阿里巴巴内部下发通知：Anthropic 全系产品（Sonnet、Opus、Fable 及 Claude Code）被列入高风险软件名单，员工 7 月 10 日前必须全员卸载，推荐使用阿里自研 Qoder 作为替代方案。触发点是开发者社区逆向发现：Claude Code 从 2026 年 4 月发布的 2.1.91 版本起，二进制文件中被 XOR 加密混淆植入了一段隐蔽代码——读取本地系统时区（命中 Asia/Shanghai / Asia/Urumqi 触发观察名单），同时匹配 147 个中国域名黑名单（阿里、字节、百度、腾讯、月之暗面、MiniMax 等主流公司均在内），命中后通过修改系统提示词中的日期格式和 Unicode 字符「秘密水印」回传服务器，用户无感知。Anthropic 工程师在 X 上承认该机制系「实验性」措施，声称已在 7 月 2 日新版本删除。
articles.summary_en: On July 3, 2026, Alibaba issued an internal notice: Anthropic's full product line (Sonnet, Opus, Fable, Claude Code) is now on the high-risk software list; all employees must uninstall by July 10, with Alibaba's in-house Qoder as the replacement. The trigger: developer community reverse-engineering found that from Claude Code version 2.1.91 (April 2026), the binary contained XOR-encrypted, obfuscated covert code — reading the local system timezone (Asia/Shanghai or Asia/Urumqi triggers a watchlist) and matching a 147-Chinese-domain blacklist (Alibaba, ByteDance, Baidu, Tencent, Moonshot, MiniMax, and other majors all included). When triggered, results were exfiltrated as "secret watermarks" via modified date-format and Unicode characters in the system prompt, invisible to the user. Anthropic engineers admitted on X the mechanism was "experimental," claiming removal in the July 2 release.
articles.source_en: Metropolis Express 2026-07-03 / 36Kr 2026-07-03 / Guancha 2026-07-03 / iFeng 2026-07-03 / EET-China 2026-07-04
articles.content: 这次风波表面上是「阿里禁用 Claude」，本质是全球 AI 供应链的信任危机第一次以「客户端隐写监控」的形式浮出水面。Anthropic 长期把「透明、可信、负责任」作为其区别于其他 AI 公司的核心招牌——公开发布的《负责任扩展政策》明确承诺「以透明和可信的方式实施系统」；Constitutional AI 治理框架将透明度列为核心支柱，声称相关原则「公开、可检查」。但此次曝光的隐蔽标记机制在多个层面与公开承诺相悖：检测代码经过刻意混淆处理逃避常规安全审查，版本更新说明中只字未提；标记结果通过替换系统提示词中的标点符号进行隐写回传，用户界面、权限提示或隐私政策中均未明确披露；Anthropic 技术团队成员事后承认「实验性」但未解释为何选择以隐蔽方式植入客户端。微软早在 5 月就要求团队逐步停止使用 Claude Code；亚马逊 2 月起限制员工在未经批准的情况下使用。产业层面这标志着 AI 大厂合规双向收紧的临界点——Anthropic 加强对中国用户封禁的同时，中国科技公司也第一次「反向禁用」美国头部 AI 工具。对开发者的直接影响：核心业务不再建立在闭源工具之上，国产替代（Qoder、CodeBuddy）从「候补」变成「主力」。
articles.content_en: This is superficially "Alibaba banning Claude," but structurally the first time global AI supply-chain trust surfaced in the form of "client-side steganographic surveillance." Anthropic has long branded itself around "transparency, trust, responsibility" — the published Responsible Scaling Policy explicitly commits to "implementing this system transparently and credibly"; the Constitutional AI framework lists transparency as a core pillar, claiming principles are "open and inspectable." But the exposed covert mechanism contradicts these commitments on multiple fronts: detection code is deliberately obfuscated to evade security audit, release notes make zero mention; results are exfiltrated via steganography — modified punctuation inside the system prompt — with no user interface, permission prompt, or privacy policy disclosure; Anthropic engineers post hoc call it "experimental" but never explain the covert client-side install choice. Microsoft told teams in May to phase out Claude Code; Amazon has restricted unapproved use since February. Industrially this marks the inflection of two-way compliance tightening — as Anthropic tightens against Chinese users, Chinese tech companies for the first time "reverse-ban" a top US AI tool. Direct developer impact: core business no longer builds on closed-source tools; domestic alternatives (Qoder, CodeBuddy) move from backup to primary.
key_points: 阿里 7 月 3 日通知全员 7 月 10 日前卸载 Claude Code、推荐 Qoder
Claude Code 2.1.91 版本起植入时区 + 147 中国域名黑名单检测
触发后隐写回传：修改系统提示词日期格式 + Unicode 字符
Anthropic 工程师承认「实验性」措施、称已在 7-02 版本删除
微软 5 月、亚马逊 2 月已先后要求停止/限制 Claude Code
key_points_en: July 3: Alibaba orders full Claude Code uninstall by July 10, recommends Qoder
Since Claude Code 2.1.91: timezone + 147-Chinese-domain covert detection
Steganographic exfiltration: modified date format + Unicode in system prompt
Anthropic engineers admit "experimental", claim removed in July 2 release
Microsoft since May, Amazon since Feb had already restricted Claude Code

articles.title: Anthropic 发布 Claude Science：60+ 科学数据库整合、UCSF 团队用它 1 年悬案压到几周
articles.title_en: Anthropic Releases Claude Science: 60+ Databases Integrated, UCSF Team Cracks a 1-Year Cold Case in Weeks
articles.summary: 2026 年 6 月 30 日，Anthropic 在旧金山 AI for Science 事件上正式发布 Claude Science——基于 Claude Opus 4.8 构建，整合超过 60 个科学数据库（基因组学、蛋白质组学、药物发现流水线），提供本地/远程/HPC 统一计算入口，支持 macOS/Linux 与 SSH，面向 Pro（$20/月起）/Max/Team/Enterprise 用户开放 beta。UCSF 脑肿瘤中心的 Stephen Francis 团队用 Claude Science 的审查代理发现自己 RNA-seq 结果被病毒污染的问题——这个疑点原来卡了他们整整一年。Allen 研究所 Jérôme Lecoq 团队把一份 2 年综述的写作压到几周；MIT Iain Cheeseman、Gladstone Sean Whalen 均已经在使用。同步启动内部药物发现项目，聚焦被大药企视为「不赚钱」的被忽视疾病（罕见遗传病、热带病）。
articles.summary_en: On June 30, 2026, Anthropic officially released Claude Science at its San Francisco AI for Science event — built on Claude Opus 4.8, integrating 60+ scientific databases (genomics, proteomics, drug-discovery pipelines), offering a unified local/remote/HPC compute entry, supporting macOS/Linux and SSH, open in beta to Pro (starting $20/month), Max, Team, and Enterprise users. UCSF Brain Tumor Center's Stephen Francis team used Claude Science's audit agent to discover viral contamination in their RNA-seq results — a puzzle that had blocked them for an entire year. Allen Institute's Jérôme Lecoq team compressed a 2-year review-writing task to weeks; MIT's Iain Cheeseman and Gladstone's Sean Whalen are already using it. In parallel, Anthropic launched an in-house drug-discovery project focused on neglected diseases (rare genetic disorders, tropical diseases) that big pharma writes off as unprofitable.
articles.source: Anthropic 官方博客 / 麻省理工科技评论 2026-07-01 / 金融界 2026-07-01 / IT 之家 2026-07-01 / 头条 AI 日报 2026-07-05
articles.source_en: Anthropic Official Blog / MIT Technology Review 2026-07-01 / Financial World 2026-07-01 / IT Home 2026-07-01 / Toutiao AI Daily 2026-07-05
articles.content: Claude Science 的设计哲学与 Claude Code 一致——把工具（数据库连接器、序列分析、基因组管线）设计为一等公民，而不是套一个「科学皮肤」的聊天窗口。它内置多智能体架构：主智能体协调子智能体完成查文献、跑计算、生成图表、撰写文稿等多步骤科研任务；独立审核代理实时校验引文与计算结果，保证科研成果可追溯、可审计。同时 Anthropic 面向学术界启动 Claude Science 项目资助计划——最多 50 个项目，每个 $30k 使用配额 + Modal 提供 $2000 计算资源。这是 AI 公司第一次从「工具提供商」升级为「科研参与者」——自建药物发现项目不是要当药企，而是要用真实的科研产出证明工具管用。行业格局：Google DeepMind 手握 AlphaFold + AlphaGenome，将其嵌进 Gemini for Science 平台；OpenAI 用 GPT-Rosalind 面向美国境内合格企业客户；Anthropic 用 Claude Science + 内部药物发现项目形成第三条路线——三家 AI 公司在生命科学领域进入正面对决。
articles.content_en: Claude Science's design philosophy mirrors Claude Code — treat tools (database connectors, sequence analysis, genome pipelines) as first-class citizens rather than wrapping a "science skin" over a chat window. Multi-agent architecture is built in: a lead agent coordinates sub-agents for literature review, computation, chart generation, and manuscript drafting; an independent audit agent verifies citations and results in real time, guaranteeing traceable, auditable science. Anthropic simultaneously launched a Claude Science grants program — up to 50 projects at $30k usage credits each, with Modal contributing $2,000 in compute per project. This is the first time an AI company upgrades from "tool provider" to "research participant" — the in-house drug program isn't about becoming a pharma company but about using real scientific output to prove the tools work. Landscape: Google DeepMind holds AlphaFold + AlphaGenome, embedded into Gemini for Science; OpenAI's GPT-Rosalind targets vetted US enterprise clients only; Anthropic's Claude Science + in-house drug discovery becomes the third path — three AI companies now go head-to-head in life sciences.
key_points: 6 月 30 日发布，整合 60+ 科学数据库
UCSF Stephen Francis 团队用它发现 RNA-seq 病毒污染卡 1 年
内置审查代理，实时校验引文与计算结果
面向 Pro（$20/月起）/Max/Team/Enterprise 开放 beta
同步启动内部药物发现项目，聚焦被忽视疾病
key_points_en: Released June 30, integrating 60+ scientific databases
UCSF Stephen Francis team cracked a 1-year RNA-seq viral-contamination cold case
Built-in audit agent verifies citations and results in real time
Beta open to Pro ($20/mo+), Max, Team, Enterprise
In-house drug-discovery project targeting neglected diseases

articles.title: Anthropic 4 亿美元收购 Coefficient Bio：8 个月大初创进入湿实验室能力
articles.title_en: Anthropic Acquires Coefficient Bio for $400M: 8-Month-Old Startup Brings Wet-Lab Capability
articles.summary: 2026 年 4 月，Anthropic 以 4 亿美元收购一家仅 8 个月大的生物初创 Coefficient Bio。该公司创始人来自 Genentech Prescient Design 团队，主要能力是把 AI 模型与传统湿实验室工作流深度打通。这次收购是 Anthropic 进入生命科学的核心动作：4 月拿到湿实验室能力 → 6 月 30 日发布 Claude Science → 7 月 John Jumper 加盟——从工具到人才到实验能力全链路补齐。Anthropic 估值目前 9650 亿美元，ARR 300-420 亿美元区间，账面充裕。生命科学被 Anthropic 定位为下一步战略主线，与 Claude Code、Claude Cowork 并列。
articles.summary_en: In April 2026, Anthropic acquired an 8-month-old biotech startup Coefficient Bio for $400M. Founded by former Genentech Prescient Design team members, its core capability is deep integration of AI models with traditional wet-lab workflows. This acquisition is central to Anthropic's life-sciences push: April wet-lab capability → June 30 Claude Science release → July John Jumper joins — the full stack from tools to talent to lab capability is now complete. Anthropic is valued at $96.5B with ARR in the $30-42B range, cash abundant. Life sciences is now positioned as a strategic pillar alongside Claude Code and Claude Cowork.
articles.source_en: Financial World 2026-07-01 / Zhi Xiang Xin Zhi 2026-06-24 / Caixin 2026-06-27 / MIT Technology Review 2026-07-01
articles.content: 4 亿美元收购一家 8 个月大的初创公司，这个交易本身即传递了强烈的战略信号——Anthropic 愿意用高倍价格换取「起跑速度」，而不是等自己内建团队。Coefficient Bio 的团队背景是关键——Genentech Prescient Design 曾以「计算生物学 + 深度学习」路线在抗体设计领域取得突破，把这套方法论移植到 Anthropic 意味着从「AI 提示词交互」直接跳到「湿实验室实验设计」的能力。Anthropic 生命科学合作负责人 Jonah Cool 表示公司在为生命科学企业提供 AI 工具的同时，将持续专注被忽视疾病研究——即那些「不赚钱但影响患者生命」的疾病（罕见遗传病、热带病）。这条路径与传统药企的商业模式（专注畅销药、争夺市场份额）截然不同，也解释了为什么 Anthropic 敢于自建药物发现项目而不担心与客户竞争。诺华 CEO Vas Narasimhan 曾公开表示 AI 有望把药物研发周期从 12 年压缩到 7-8 年、成功率从 8% 升到 16%——按 2024 年全球医药 R&D 支出 3000 亿美元估算，产业效率翻倍意味着数千亿美元级的价值再分配。
articles.content_en: Buying an 8-month-old startup for $400M is itself a strong strategic signal — Anthropic pays a premium for launch speed rather than waiting to build internally. The founding team's Genentech Prescient Design pedigree is the key asset — Prescient Design pioneered "computational biology + deep learning" for antibody design, transplanting that methodology to Anthropic jumps directly from "prompt-interaction AI" to "wet-lab experiment design." Anthropic's life-sciences partnerships head Jonah Cool has stated that while providing AI tools to life-science companies, the company will continue focusing on neglected diseases — those that are "unprofitable but life-changing" (rare genetic disorders, tropical diseases). This path differs fundamentally from big pharma's blockbuster-focused model and explains why Anthropic can build in-house drug discovery without threatening customer relationships. Novartis CEO Vas Narasimhan publicly states AI could compress drug R&D from 12 years to 7-8 years, raising success rates from 8% to 16% — on a $300B global 2024 pharma R&D base, doubling efficiency implies hundreds of billions in value reallocation.

生命科学定位为下一步战略主线

articles.title: GLM-5.2 冲上 Design Arena #1、Elo 1360 力压不可用的 Claude Fable 5
articles.title_en: GLM-5.2 Tops Design Arena at #1 with 1360 Elo, Overtaking Now-Unavailable Claude Fable 5
articles.summary: 2026 年 6 月，中国智谱 AI 发布的开放权重模型 GLM-5.2 在 Design Arena 榜单上冲到 #1 位、Elo 分 1360，力压刚因美国出口管制禁令而在全球范围下架的 Claude Fable 5。观察者指出这是首个非多模态模型登顶设计类别。深度学习先驱 Jeremy Howard 公开评价 GLM-5.2「至少与 Opus 4.8 和 GPT-5.5 相当」，同时具备速度快、成本低、细腻、长上下文能力强的组合。这是中国开源模型第一次在国际主流评测中同时达到「性能对标 + 商业可用」双达标。
articles.summary_en: In June 2026, Chinese Zhipu AI's open-weight model GLM-5.2 topped the Design Arena leaderboard at #1 with 1360 Elo, overtaking the now globally-unavailable Claude Fable 5 (removed due to US export controls). Observers noted it's the first non-multimodal model to lead the design category. Deep-learning pioneer Jeremy Howard publicly rated GLM-5.2 as "at least as good as Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5," combining speed, low cost, nuance, and strong long-context ability. This is the first time a Chinese open-source model simultaneously hit "performance parity + commercial availability" in international mainstream benchmarks.
articles.source: zeronoise.ai 2026-06-20 / Jeremy Howard X / Design Arena / 财新 2026-06-27
articles.source_en: zeronoise.ai 2026-06-20 / Jeremy Howard X / Design Arena / Caixin 2026-06-27
articles.content: GLM-5.2 的登顶与 Claude Fable 5 的下架存在直接因果——美国商务部对 Anthropic Mythos 和 Fable 系列的出口管制，把 Anthropic 的顶级模型从全球市场撤走，为 GLM-5.2 让出了实际的竞争空位。斯坦福 AI 研究员 Andrew Ng 公开评论：美国的出口管制正在把更多国家推向「AI 主权」和「开源替代」的路径。Jeremy Howard 在 X 平台的评测更加直接——GLM-5.2 不仅性能对标，还兼具速度快、成本低、细腻、长上下文四大优势。中国开源模型的商业化模式与美国头部厂商截然不同：GLM-5.2 采用 MIT/Apache 型宽松许可，任何企业可以自由部署、微调、商用，而 Claude Fable 5 只能通过 API 调用且日益受出口管制约束。这种「开源 vs 闭源 + 出口管制」的对撞正在重塑全球大模型的可用性版图。
articles.content_en: GLM-5.2's ascent and Fable 5's disappearance are causally linked — US Commerce Department export controls on Anthropic's Mythos and Fable series pulled its top models from global markets, leaving a real competitive gap for GLM-5.2. Stanford AI researcher Andrew Ng commented publicly: US export controls are pushing more countries toward "AI sovereignty" and open-source alternatives. Jeremy Howard's X assessment is even more direct — GLM-5.2 not only reaches parity but also brings speed, cost, nuance, and long-context advantages. Chinese open-source commercial models differ fundamentally from top US vendors: GLM-5.2 uses MIT/Apache-style permissive licensing — any company can freely deploy, fine-tune, and commercialize — whereas Claude Fable 5 is API-only and increasingly export-controlled. This "open vs closed + export controls" collision is reshaping the global LLM availability landscape.

articles.title: 为撑住 1450 亿 CapEx：Meta 发 250 亿美元债券、裁员 8000 人、砍 6000 个岗位
articles.title_en: Financing $145B Capex: Meta Issues $25B Bonds, Cuts 8,000 Jobs, Eliminates 6,000 Positions
articles.summary: Meta 2026 年资本支出指引 1250-1450 亿美元、较 2025 年 722 亿美元几乎翻倍。为筹钱 Meta 一边发了 250 亿美元债券，一边裁员 8000 人、砍了 6000 个岗位。截至 2026 Q1 末，Meta 已经承诺未来几年砸下 1829 亿美元用于 AI 基础设施建设。俄亥俄州数据中心项目规模「将媲美曼哈顿岛」，预计 2026 年内投入运营；得克萨斯州埃尔帕索数据中心投资从 15 亿美元扩大至 100 亿美元，增幅超 6 倍。同时 Meta 一季度 capex 195 亿美元（含融资租赁本金支付），营收 563 亿美元。
articles.summary_en: Meta's 2026 capex guidance stands at $125-145B, nearly double the 2025 actual $72.2B. To finance it, Meta issued $25B in bonds, cut 8,000 headcount, and eliminated 6,000 positions. As of Q1 2026, Meta has committed $182.9B in future AI infrastructure spending. The Ohio data-center project is described as "comparable in scale to Manhattan Island" and is targeted for 2026 operations; Texas El Paso data-center investment was expanded from $1.5B to $10B — over 6x. Meta's Q1 capex was $19.5B (including finance-lease principal), on revenue of $56.3B.
articles.source_en: 36Kr 2026-07-03 / Wall Street CN 2026-07-02 / implicator.ai 2026-05-27 / SMZDM 2026-07
articles.content: Meta 2026 年的资本开支结构大致分三块——核心算力与芯片采购、数据中心 + 能源基建、外部算力租赁与合作。核心算力方面：英伟达采购其 Blackwell、Rubin GPU 及 Grace CPU；AMD 自 2026 年下半年起在五年协议中大量采用 Instinct GPU 与 Venice EPYC CPU；博通深化合作推进用于 AI 的定制化 ASIC 芯片。能源保障方面：投资超 270 亿美元建 Hyperion 园区，资助 7 座天然气电厂（总装机超 5200 兆瓦），购买约 1 吉瓦太阳能及太空光伏项目。外部租赁方面：Nebius Group 投入最高 270 亿美元、CoreWeave 累计约 352 亿美元。这种「自建 + 外购 + 反向对外销售」的三层结构让 Meta 拥有极高的成本操盘空间——闲置算力对外租赁不是应急变现，而是提前规划好的三层次组合中的最外圈。
articles.content_en: Meta's 2026 capex breaks into three buckets — compute/silicon procurement, data center + energy infrastructure, and external compute leasing/partnerships. Compute: NVIDIA Blackwell, Rubin GPUs and Grace CPUs; AMD Instinct GPUs and Venice EPYC CPUs under a five-year deal starting H2 2026; deeper Broadcom partnership on AI custom ASICs. Energy: $27B+ on the Hyperion campus, financing 7 gas power plants (>5,200 MW combined), ~1 GW solar plus space photovoltaic. External leasing: up to $27B with Nebius Group, ~$35.2B cumulative with CoreWeave. This three-layer "build + buy + sell externally" structure gives Meta exceptional cost flexibility — renting spare capacity is not emergency monetization but the outermost ring of a pre-planned three-layer combination.

articles.title: Google 每月 9.2 亿美元租 SpaceX Colossus：约 11 万 GPU、租期 2026-10 至 2029-6
articles.title_en: Google Rents SpaceX Colossus for $920M/Month: ~110,000 GPUs, Term Oct 2026 to Jun 2029
articles.summary: SpaceX 的 Colossus 数据中心已经先后与两家 AI 巨头签署超大规模算力租约。Anthropic 在 2026 年上半年签下 22 万 GPU、300 兆瓦、180 天的短期租约；Google 则从 2026 年 10 月至 2029 年 6 月每月支付 SpaceX 约 9.2 亿美元、总期限 2 年 9 个月、总金额超 300 亿美元，租用约 11 万块 NVIDIA GPU。这两笔租约是 SpaceX 首次把「非火箭业务」跑到千亿美元级；也是全球超大规模云的边界第一次被非传统云玩家（SpaceX、Meta）主动改写。
articles.summary_en: SpaceX's Colossus data center has signed two hyperscale AI leases. Anthropic secured a 220,000-GPU, 300 MW, 180-day short-term lease in H1 2026. Google will pay SpaceX ~$920M/month from Oct 2026 to Jun 2029 — 2 years 9 months, exceeding $30B total — for ~110,000 NVIDIA GPUs. These two leases mark SpaceX's first "non-rocket" business at the $100B scale; they also mark the first time hyperscale cloud boundaries are actively rewritten by non-traditional players (SpaceX, Meta).
articles.content: SpaceX Colossus 的角色定位很有意思——它既不像 AWS/Azure/GCP 那样做「一体化云服务」，也不像 CoreWeave 那样做「纯 GPU 时段租赁」，而是介于两者之间：把整块巨型 GPU 集群按「30 万卡打包」的粒度出租，服务对象是「训练一个前沿大模型」这种量级的客户。这解释了为什么 Anthropic 只签 180 天短租——一次训练完成即可搬迁；也解释了为什么 Google 敢签近 3 年长约——Gemini 系列需要持续的推理算力堆叠。这个市场的规律：租户是超大规模 AI 公司、租期是「一次训练周期」或「持续推理周期」、单价是普通云的 3-5 倍但省去自建的资本占用。Meta Compute 的入场直接冲击的是这类「超大规模包租」市场——而不是传统企业的按需算力。全球超大规模云的边界正在被改写。
articles.content_en: SpaceX Colossus's positioning is interesting — it's neither an "all-in-one cloud" like AWS/Azure/GCP, nor a "pure GPU hourly rental" like CoreWeave; it sits between: leasing entire mega GPU clusters in "300k-card bundles," serving customers at the scale of "training a frontier LLM." This explains why Anthropic only signed 180 days — relocatable after one training run — and why Google is willing to sign nearly three years — Gemini needs sustained inference stacking. Market laws: tenants are hyperscale AI firms; term is "one training cycle" or "sustained inference cycle"; unit price is 3-5x normal cloud but eliminates capex lock-up. Meta Compute's entry directly targets this "hyperscale bulk lease" market, not conventional enterprise on-demand compute. Global hyperscale cloud boundaries are being rewritten.

Google 2026-10 至 2029-6 每月 9.2 亿美元、约 11 万 GPU

非传统云玩家改写全球超大规模云边界

articles.title: Anthropic 估值 9650 亿美元、ARR 300-420 亿：进入生命科学的资本底牌
articles.title_en: Anthropic Valued at $965B, ARR $30-42B: The Capital Base Behind Its Life-Sciences Play
articles.summary: 2026 年 Anthropic 的估值已达 9650 亿美元、ARR 区间 300-420 亿美元——公司账面充裕，为其能同时展开 Claude Code、Claude Cowork、Claude Science 三线布局以及自建药物发现项目提供了资本底牌。这个估值水平让 Anthropic 有能力用 4 亿美元买下 8 个月大的初创公司（Coefficient Bio）、用旗舰级人才（John Jumper）押注非核心业务、以最多 50 个项目每个 $30k + Modal $2000 计算资源的规模资助学术界——这些动作在中小规模 AI 公司层面完全不成立。
articles.summary_en: Anthropic's 2026 valuation stands at $96.5B with ARR at $30-42B — the balance sheet is what enables simultaneous Claude Code, Claude Cowork, Claude Science tracks plus an in-house drug discovery program. This scale is what makes it possible to acquire an 8-month-old startup (Coefficient Bio) for $400M, bet flagship-level talent (John Jumper) on a non-core area, and fund academia at up to 50 projects × $30k + $2,000 Modal compute — moves impossible at mid-scale AI companies.
articles.source_en: MIT Technology Review 2026-07-01 / Caixin 2026-06-27 / Zhi Xiang Xin Zhi 2026-06-24 / Toutiao AI Daily 2026-07-05
articles.content: 9650 亿美元估值 + 300-420 亿美元 ARR 意味着什么？——按 P/S 大约 23-32 倍，这个水平已经远高于 OpenAI 的公开估值区间，也高于 Google DeepMind 母公司 Alphabet 的整体 P/S。这个估值支撑下，Anthropic 可以做三件传统 AI 公司做不了的事：一是用 Coefficient Bio + Jumper + Claude Science 的三线组合把生命科学做到与 Claude Code 并列；二是把 usage credits 从辅助计费手段升级为主要收入模型（Fable 5 已经彻底剥离订阅）；三是同时向学术界大规模资助，让 Claude Science 的用户生态在诞生初期就获得广泛验证。资本、人才、工具三面同步落地，Anthropic 的产业野心比外界感知的更大——它不仅是「继续做前沿模型」，而是要用 AI 定义生命科学的下一个 10 年。
articles.content_en: $96.5B valuation + $30-42B ARR translates to a P/S of ~23-32x — far above OpenAI's public valuation range and even above the overall P/S of Google DeepMind parent Alphabet. This capital base lets Anthropic do three things impossible at mid-scale AI: (1) build life sciences to peer level with Claude Code via Coefficient Bio + Jumper + Claude Science; (2) elevate usage credits from supplementary billing to primary revenue model (Fable 5 fully unbundled); (3) simultaneously fund academia at scale so Claude Science's user ecosystem is broadly validated from birth. Capital, talent, tools — all three fronts landed synchronously. Anthropic's industrial ambition is bigger than the outside sees — it's not just "continue frontier models" but to define the next decade of life sciences with AI.

articles.title: 微软 5 月、亚马逊 2 月早已限制 Claude Code：全球大厂对闭源工具的信任正在整体退坡
articles.title_en: Microsoft (May) and Amazon (Feb) Already Restricted Claude Code: Big Tech's Trust in Closed-Source Tools Is Broadly Retreating
articles.summary: 阿里巴巴 7 月 10 日全员卸载 Claude Code 只是最新的一环——2026 年 2 月亚马逊已限制员工在未经批准情况下使用 Claude Code；2026 年 5 月微软要求团队逐步停止使用。三家大厂的判断依据不完全相同（数据泄露风险、竞对风险、隐蔽检测机制），但共同结论是：核心业务不能建立在自己无法审计的闭源工具之上。这标志着全球大厂对闭源 AI 工具的信任正在整体退坡——即使是最领先的模型，也要经得起客户端行为的透明审查。
articles.summary_en: Alibaba's July 10 full uninstall is the latest chapter — Amazon already restricted employees from using Claude Code without approval in Feb 2026; Microsoft told teams to phase it out in May 2026. The three giants' rationale differed (data leakage risk, competitive risk, covert-detection mechanism), but the common conclusion is: core business cannot build on closed-source tools that can't be audited. This marks a broad retreat of Big Tech trust in closed-source AI tools — even the most leading models must survive transparent scrutiny of client-side behavior.
articles.content: 亚马逊 2 月和微软 5 月的动作背景是双方与 Anthropic 的复杂关系：亚马逊是 Anthropic 最大的战略投资方之一（80 亿美元投资）、又是其云基础设施主要提供方（AWS）；微软则是 OpenAI 的深度绑定方——两家公司对 Claude Code 的态度可以看作是「即使有商业合作，也要控制员工端使用」的分层策略。阿里的动作则不同——阿里没有 Anthropic 的投资关系，本轮起于 Claude Code 二进制文件中被反向工程发现的隐蔽检测机制。三家大厂虽然出发点不完全一致，但共同揭示了同一个趋势：闭源客户端工具在企业环境中越来越受不信任，尤其是那些拥有本地文件系统读写权限、可执行 Shell 命令、可以直接接触用户代码与配置的高权限 Agent 工具。这将促使企业向「可审计的开源工具 + 内部部署」倾斜——阿里推自研 Qoder、腾讯推 CodeBuddy、字节推自研工具都是这一趋势的具象化。
articles.content_en: The backdrop for Amazon (Feb) and Microsoft (May) is their complex Anthropic relationships: Amazon is one of Anthropic's largest strategic investors ($8B) and its main cloud infrastructure provider (AWS); Microsoft is deeply tied to OpenAI. Their stance on Claude Code reflects a tiered strategy — "even with business partnership, keep employee-side use under control." Alibaba's move differs — no Anthropic investment relationship, and this wave was triggered by reverse-engineered covert detection code in the Claude Code binary. Though rationales differ, all three reveal the same trend: closed-source client tools are increasingly distrusted in enterprise environments — especially high-privilege agent tools with local filesystem read/write, shell execution, and direct access to user code and configs. This will push enterprises toward "auditable open-source tools + internal deployment" — Alibaba pushing in-house Qoder, Tencent pushing CodeBuddy, ByteDance building internal tools all materialize this trend.
key_points: 亚马逊 2026-02 限制员工在未经批准情况下使用

All three converge: core business cannot build on un-auditable closed tools

hero.title: Anthropic 剥离 Fable 5 订阅、软银 3.39 万亿豪赌 SB Neo、中国 Token 用量连续 9 周超美——AI 产业化临界点全面到来
hero.title_en: Anthropic Unbundles Fable 5, SoftBank Bets 3.39 Trillion RMB on SB Neo, China Tops US in Token Usage for 9 Weeks — AI's Commercialization Inflection Lands in Full
hero.source: Anthropic 官方博客 / 36 氪 / 智东西 / 每日经济新闻 / 科创板日报 / 新浪财经 / 网易科技 / CSDN / Digital Applied / Usagebox
hero.source_en: Anthropic Official Blog / 36Kr / Zhidx / National Business Daily / Kechuang Board Daily / Sina Finance / NetEase Tech / CSDN / Digital Applied / Usagebox
hero.summary: 7 月 1 日 Anthropic 让 Claude Fable 5 限时回归、7 天 50% 周额度、7 月 7 日之后彻底剥离订阅套餐、转按 usage credits 计费，输入 $10 / 输出 $50 每百万 Token——Anthropic 用旗舰模型率先撕开订阅制。同一周软银官宣 SB Neo Inc. 特拉华州注册、目标 2030 年前后 10 吉瓦、俄亥俄州派克顿项目 5000 亿美元（约 3.39 万亿元人民币）；DeepSeek 官宣 V4 正式版 7 月中旬上线、首推峰谷定价——高峰 7 小时价格翻倍；中国 Token 用量已连续 9 周超越美国、6 月 22-28 日 20.39 万亿 vs 4.25 万亿，差距近 5 倍，Claude Sonnet 4.6 四个月来首次跌出榜单。三件事同一周落地，AI 商业化范式重排的三面切片同时到位。
hero.summary_en: On July 1, Anthropic reintroduced Claude Fable 5 for a 7-day promo at 50% weekly quota; after July 7 it fully exits every subscription tier and moves to usage credits at $10 input / $50 output per million tokens — Anthropic ships the first true subscription unbundling on a flagship. In the same week, SoftBank announced SB Neo Inc. registered in Delaware, targeting 10 GW by 2030 with a $500B (~3.39 trillion RMB) Piketon, Ohio buildout. DeepSeek announced V4 GA in mid-July with first-of-its-kind peak-and-trough pricing — 7 daytime peak hours at 2x rate. China's token usage has now led the US for 9 weeks running: 20.39T vs 4.25T for the week of June 22-28, a ~5x gap; Claude Sonnet 4.6 fell off the top-10 list for the first time in four months. Three events, one week — three cross-sections of the same commercial-model reshuffle land in sync.

articles.title: Anthropic 剥离 Fable 5 订阅：7 月 7 日之后彻底转 usage credits、API 定价 $10/$50 是 Opus 4.8 的 2 倍
articles.title_en: Anthropic Unbundles Fable 5: After July 7, Full Switch to Usage Credits, API Priced at $10/$50 — 2x Opus 4.8
articles.summary: 2026 年 7 月 1 日，Anthropic 官网公告 Claude Fable 5 限时回归所有订阅套餐，Pro / Max 5x / Max 20x / Team 用户可将每周额度的最多 50% 用于 Fable 5；7 月 7 日 PT 23:59:59 之后 Fable 5 彻底剥离订阅、转按 usage credits 计费，API 定价输入 $10 / 输出 $50 每百万 Token，约为 Opus 4.8 的 2 倍。美国境内推理加价 1.1 倍、且仅在美国基础设施推理。Fable 5 单任务 Token 消耗约为 Opus 4.8 的 2 倍——总账单达 4 倍。这是继 6 月 15 日 Agent SDK 剥离方案生效当天叫停之后，Anthropic 首次让「按模型剥离」真正落地。
articles.summary_en: On July 1, 2026, Anthropic announced Claude Fable 5's limited-time return to all subscription tiers. Pro / Max 5x / Max 20x / Team users can spend up to 50% of their weekly quota on Fable 5; after July 7 PT 23:59:59, Fable 5 exits every subscription tier and moves to usage credits, API priced at $10 input / $50 output per million tokens — roughly 2x Opus 4.8. US workloads are marked up 1.1x and must run on US infrastructure. Per-task token consumption on Fable 5 is roughly 2x Opus 4.8, meaning the total bill is 4x. This is the first shipped per-model unbundling after Anthropic halted its June 15 Agent SDK unbundling on the day it was supposed to go live.
articles.source: Anthropic 官方博客《Claude Fable 5 promotional access》/ 36 氪 2026-07-02 / 智东西 2026-07-02 / 新智元微博 2026-07-02 / CSDN 博客 2026-07-02 / Digital Applied 2026-06-16 / Usagebox 2026-06-09
articles.source_en: Anthropic Blog "Claude Fable 5 promotional access" / 36Kr 2026-07-02 / Zhidx 2026-07-02 / Xinzhiyuan Weibo 2026-07-02 / CSDN blog 2026-07-02 / Digital Applied 2026-06-16 / Usagebox 2026-06-09
articles.content: Anthropic 官方博客明确 Fable 5「消耗额度更快」——实测下单个复杂任务 Token 消耗约为 Opus 4.8 的 2 倍。Max 20x 用户已有报告显示 3 个大 prompt 消耗 $90 API 费用、30 分钟耗掉 60% 5 小时段额度。Fable 5 引入独立于主模型之外的 safety classifier「多层防护机制」，针对网络安全、生物化学、模型蒸馏三类高风险请求做实时判定；触发后请求会被拦截或自动回退到 Opus 4.8。开发者社区反馈误伤率显著高于 Opus 系列——BridgeBench 排名从第 9 跌到第 41。7 月 7 日之后，Fable 5 从所有订阅套餐里彻底剥离，用户要么开启 usage credits 按 API 挂牌价继续调用，要么切换到 Opus 4.8 / Sonnet 5 继续消耗订阅额度。Claude.ai 网页端、桌面端、移动端交互式使用不受影响。这一步撕开的不是一款模型的定价，而是过去 18 个月订阅制补贴推理算力这套商业模式的临界点。
articles.content_en: Anthropic's own docs concede Fable 5 "consumes quota faster" — in practice a single complex task consumes roughly 2x the tokens of Opus 4.8. Max 20x users have reported three large prompts consuming $90 of API-equivalent spend, or 60% of a 5-hour window burned in 30 minutes. Fable 5 introduces a standalone safety classifier defense-in-depth mechanism outside the main model, doing real-time judgments on cybersecurity, biochemistry, and model-distillation risk categories; a triggered request is either blocked or auto-routed back to Opus 4.8. Community feedback shows a false-positive rate significantly higher than Opus — BridgeBench ranking dropped from 9th to 41st. After July 7, Fable 5 exits every subscription tier. Users either turn on usage credits at API list price, or fall back to Opus 4.8 / Sonnet 5. Interactive use on Claude.ai web, desktop, and mobile is unaffected. What this rips open is not the pricing of one model, but the inflection point of 18 months of subscription-subsidized inference.

7 月 7 日 PT 23:59:59 之后彻底剥离订阅、转 usage credits
API 定价 $10 输入 / $50 输出（Opus 4.8 的 2 倍）
Fable 5 单任务 Token 消耗约为 Opus 4.8 的 2 倍——总账单 4 倍
美国境内推理加价 1.1 倍且仅在美国基础设施推理
key_points_en: July 1: Fable 5 returns with a 7-day 50% weekly-quota bridge
After July 7 PT 23:59:59: fully unbundled, switched to usage credits
API price: $10 input / $50 output per million tokens (2x Opus 4.8)
Per-task token consumption ~2x Opus 4.8 — total bill 4x

articles.title: 软银官宣 SB Neo Inc.：目标 2030 年 10 吉瓦、俄亥俄州派克顿单项目 3.39 万亿人民币
articles.title_en: SoftBank Unveils SB Neo Inc.: 10 GW Target by 2030, $500B ~ 3.39 Trillion RMB on the Piketon Ohio Project Alone
articles.summary: 2026 年 7 月 2 日，日本软银集团宣布合资在美国特拉华州注册成立 SB Neo Inc.，软银公司 51% + 软银集团 49%，2027 财年（2028-03 前）商用，2030 年前后目标 10 吉瓦数据中心容量。俄亥俄州派克顿单项目投资 5000 亿美元（约 3.39 万亿元人民币），第一阶段燃气电厂 800 兆瓦、投资 300-400 亿美元、2028 年初完工。孙正义 3 月 20 日已亲自出席派克顿电厂奠基，与美商务部长 Howard Lutnick 同框。软银承诺 10 月前向 OpenAI 累计投入 650 亿美元，并以 OpenAI 股份抵押重启银行财团 100 亿美元贷款谈判。
articles.summary_en: On July 2, 2026, SoftBank announced SB Neo Inc., a Delaware-registered joint venture (SoftBank Corp. 51% + SoftBank Group 49%), targeting commercialization by FY2027 (before March 2028) and 10 GW of data-center capacity by 2030. The Piketon, Ohio project alone is a $500B (~3.39 trillion RMB) buildout; the first phase 800 MW gas turbine plant is a $30-40B build, targeted for early 2028. Masayoshi Son personally attended the Piketon groundbreaking on March 20, appearing alongside US Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick. SoftBank has committed $65B to OpenAI by October, and is restarting a $10B bank-consortium loan negotiation using OpenAI equity as collateral.
articles.source_en: Kechuang Board Daily 2026-07-02 / 36Kr 2026-07-02 / Sina Finance 2026-07-02 / NetEase Tech 2026-07-02 / SoftBank Group Newsroom
articles.content: SB Neo 是软银历史上第一次把 AI 基础设施做成软银公司下一个 20 年主业务的顶层设计——软银公司 51% + 软银集团 49% 的股权结构，让电信业务放到主导位。软银社长 Junichi Miyakawa（宫川润一）把这次动作定义为软银的「第二次创业」——软银电信业务未来 5 年营业利润有望翻 3-4 倍达到 3-4 万亿日元（约 1400-1900 亿元人民币）。技术底座上，软银自研的 Infrinia AI Cloud OS 从 5 月起在日本本土进入 Beta 阶段，为 SB Neo 提供 OS 层与算力调度层的能力。派克顿单项目 5000 亿美元的具体拆解：燃气电厂 330 亿美元，超大规模 AI 数据中心（含机房、存储、算力、光纤等）5000 亿美元。这份资本设计形成清晰循环：软银投资 OpenAI → 持有 OpenAI 股份 → 用股份抵押贷款 → 贷款建电厂 + 算力 → 电厂 + 算力向 OpenAI 供电供算 → 支撑 OpenAI 估值 → 反向增厚软银抵押品。
articles.content_en: SB Neo represents the first time SoftBank has built AI infrastructure as its top-line business for the next 20 years — the 51%/49% split places telecom operations in the driver's seat. CEO Junichi Miyakawa framed the move as SoftBank's "second founding" — telecom operating profit is projected to grow 3-4x over the next five years to JPY 3-4T (~140-190B RMB). The tech foundation is Infrinia AI Cloud OS, self-developed by SoftBank and in beta in Japan since May, providing OS-layer and scheduling-layer capabilities for SB Neo. The $500B Piketon breakdown: $33B for the gas turbine plant, $500B for the hyperscale AI data center (facilities, storage, compute, fiber). The capital design forms a clear loop: SoftBank invests in OpenAI → holds OpenAI equity → uses equity as loan collateral → loan funds power + compute buildout → power + compute serves OpenAI → supports OpenAI valuation → reinforces SoftBank's collateral value.

articles.title: DeepSeek V4 正式版 7 月中旬上线、首推峰谷定价：高峰 7 小时 API 价格翻倍
articles.title_en: DeepSeek V4 GA in Mid-July, First-Ever Peak-and-Trough Pricing: 7 Daytime Hours at 2x Rate
articles.summary: 2026 年 6 月 29 日，DeepSeek 官宣 V4 正式版将于 7 月中旬上线，并首次引入「峰谷定价」机制——上午 9 点-12 点 + 下午 14 点-18 点共 7 个高峰时段 API 价格翻 1 倍，其他时段按原价。V4 Pro：输入缓存命中 0.025→0.05 元/百万；缓存未命中 3→6 元；输出 6→12 元。V4 Flash：缓存命中 0.02→0.04；未命中 1→2；输出 2→4 元。DeepSeek 官方称 V4 相比 V3 推理算力消耗提升约 40%，峰谷定价可让大部分错峰开发者享受更低综合费率。这是全球主流大模型 API 里首份按时段动态计价的公开定价表。
articles.summary_en: On June 29, 2026, DeepSeek announced V4 GA in mid-July with a first-of-its-kind peak-and-trough pricing mechanism: 9-12 AM + 2-6 PM (7 daytime peak hours) at 2x rate; all other hours at the base rate. V4 Pro: input cache hit 0.025→0.05 RMB/M tokens; cache miss 3→6 RMB; output 6→12 RMB. V4 Flash: cache hit 0.02→0.04; miss 1→2; output 2→4 RMB. DeepSeek says V4 uses about 40% more inference compute than V3; peak-and-trough pricing lets most off-peak developers enjoy a lower blended rate. This is the first publicly disclosed time-of-day pricing table across mainstream LLM APIs globally.
articles.source_en: DeepSeek Official Announcement 2026-06-29 / Red Star News 2026-06-30 / Yangtze Daily 2026-06-30 / Jinrongjie 2026-06-29
articles.content: DeepSeek V4 的峰谷定价把电网经济学里成熟的「削峰填谷」逻辑第一次搬到 AI API 计价——高峰时段翻倍不是为了多赚钱，而是引导用户错峰调用、把重度自动化任务/非交互式批处理/离线数据分析等负载引导到平段时段，从而提升整体算力资源的利用率。V4 相比 V3 推理算力消耗提升约 40%，官方表示峰谷机制可让「大部分错峰开发者享受更低的综合费率」。这份定价的战略意图很明确——同一款模型、两种价格，让「谁愿意接受不确定的响应时间」和「谁必须实时响应」两类用户自然分账。同一周 Anthropic 剥离 Fable 5 订阅、OpenAI 推理成本被 The Information 报道下降 50%——三家 AI 头部厂商在同一个窗口做出三种截然不同的选择：Anthropic 用剥离旗舰承认订阅制承载不了尖端模型、OpenAI 用工程优化把订阅制承载能力翻倍、DeepSeek 用峰谷把边际算力成本按时段传导给用户。
articles.content_en: DeepSeek V4's peak-and-trough pricing is the first time the mature grid economics of "peak shaving" have been applied directly to AI API pricing. Doubling peak rates is not about extra revenue — it is about steering users to off-peak scheduling, pushing heavy automation, non-interactive batch, and offline analytics into trough hours to raise overall utilization. V4 uses ~40% more inference compute than V3, and DeepSeek says the mechanism lets "most off-peak developers enjoy a lower blended rate." The strategic intent is clear: one model, two prices, splitting users into "can tolerate variable latency" versus "needs real-time response" self-selecting groups. In the same week, Anthropic unbundled Fable 5 and The Information reported OpenAI cut inference cost by 50% — three top vendors chose three different paths: Anthropic admits subscriptions can't carry the frontier, OpenAI doubles subscription capacity via engineering, DeepSeek passes the marginal cost through as time-of-day rate.

高峰 9-12 + 14-18 共 7 小时，价格翻 1 倍
V4 Pro 输出高峰 12 元/百万 Token，V4 Flash 4 元/百万
V4 相比 V3 推理算力消耗提升约 40%
全球主流大模型 API 首份按时段动态计价

Peak hours: 9-12 AM + 2-6 PM (7 hours), 2x rate

articles.title: 中国 AI Token 用量连续 9 周超美国：46.7 万亿背后中美差距近 5 倍、Claude Sonnet 4.6 跌出榜单
articles.title_en: China Tops US in Token Usage for 9 Consecutive Weeks: 46.7T Total, US Gap Nears 5x, Claude Sonnet 4.6 Drops Off Top-10
articles.summary: 《每日经济新闻》联合摩根大通研究团队 6 月 29 日发布 6 月 22-28 日全球 LLM Token 用量榜——全球总量 46.7 万亿，中国 20.39 万亿（周环比 +8.4%）、美国 4.25 万亿（周环比 -26.22%）。中国用量已连续 9 周超越美国、差距近 5 倍。前 3 全部中国：DeepSeek-V4-Flash（4.66 万亿，连 6 周冠军）、小米 MiMo-V2.5（4.48 万亿）、MiniMax M3（3.74 万亿）；智谱 GLM-5.2 第 7（2.11 万亿，周环比 +66%）。Claude Sonnet 4.6 四个月来首次跌出前 10——Anthropic 剥离方案的显性代价开始显现。摩根大通同期数据：6 月 LLM Token 消费环比 +70%（5 月 +33%、4 月 +5%），同比 20 倍；Token 支出美国模型仍占 85%。
articles.summary_en: On June 29, National Business Daily and JPMorgan Research released the June 22-28 global LLM token usage ranking: worldwide 46.7T tokens, China 20.39T (+8.4% WoW), US 4.25T (-26.22% WoW). China has led the US for 9 straight weeks, gap nearing 5x. The top 3 are all Chinese: DeepSeek-V4-Flash (4.66T, 6 weeks at #1), Xiaomi MiMo-V2.5 (4.48T), MiniMax M3 (3.74T). Zhipu GLM-5.2 ranked #7 (2.11T, +66% WoW). Claude Sonnet 4.6 fell off the top-10 for the first time in four months — the visible cost of Anthropic's unbundling starts to show. JPMorgan's numbers: LLM token consumption grew 70% MoM in June (May +33%, April +5%), ~20x YoY; US models still hold ~85% of token spending.
articles.source: 每日经济新闻 2026-06-29 / 摩根大通《LLM 6 月消费月报》/ OpenRouter 榜单
articles.source_en: National Business Daily 2026-06-29 / JPMorgan "LLM June Consumption Report" / OpenRouter Rankings
articles.content: 从 2026 年 4 月最后一周中国占 42%、美国占 48%，到 6 月第 4 周中国 43.6%、美国 9.1%——中美 Token 用量比值从 0.87 倍拉到 4.8 倍。剪刀差核心解释是「中国模型在跑量，美国模型在赚钱」：20 万亿中国 Token 主要来自国内低价 API + 免费额度带来的中小开发者试用；4.25 万亿美国 Token 里绝大部分是 Claude Opus 4.7/4.8、GPT-5.5、Sonnet 4.6 这三款高价旗舰模型跑在企业级客户的 SaaS 生产环境里。摩根大通判断：LLM Token 消费加速期还没结束、至少还会持续 6-9 个月；美国大模型的 Token 支出份额会缓慢下降但短期不会崩塌——12 个月后从 85% 下降到 70-75%，不会跌破 60%。智谱 GLM-5.2 +66% 的高速增长动因：中国移动 / 中国联通 / 光大 / 平安 / 宁德时代等企业客户 6 月正式部署 GLM-5.2 私有化版本；API 定价一次性下调 40%；AutoGLM Agent 新增 12 个开箱即用场景。
articles.content_en: From the last week of April 2026 (China 42%, US 48%) to the 4th week of June (China 43.6%, US 9.1%), the China-to-US token ratio widened from 0.87x to 4.8x. The core explanation: Chinese models run volume, US models bank revenue. The 20T Chinese tokens mostly come from low-priced APIs and free-tier trials among SMB developers; the 4.25T US tokens are heavily concentrated in Claude Opus 4.7/4.8, GPT-5.5, and Sonnet 4.6 running enterprise SaaS production workloads. JPMorgan's calls: LLM token consumption acceleration will continue for another 6-9 months; US models' spending share will slide slowly but won't collapse — from 85% today to 70-75% in 12 months, unlikely to break below 60%. Zhipu GLM-5.2's +66% surge is driven by: enterprise deployments at China Mobile, China Unicom, Everbright, Ping An, CATL going live in June; a 40% API price cut; and 12 new out-of-the-box scenarios in AutoGLM Agent.

中国 Token 用量连续 9 周超美国、差距近 5 倍
前 3 全部中国：DeepSeek-V4-Flash / 小米 MiMo-V2.5 / MiniMax M3
智谱 GLM-5.2 第 7（周环比 +66%），Claude Sonnet 4.6 跌出榜单

China tops US in token usage for 9 straight weeks, gap ~5x

articles.title: 美国主权基金拟收购 OpenAI 5% 股权：AI 投资规模化政策工具首落地
articles.title_en: US Sovereign Fund Reportedly Weighs 5% Stake in OpenAI: First Scale Deployment of AI-Investment Policy Tools
articles.summary: 据 2026 年 6 月 30 日多方消息渠道，美国主权投资基金（Sovereign Wealth Fund）拟收购 OpenAI 约 5% 的股权，相关谈判进入实质性阶段。若按 OpenAI 当前估值约 5000 亿美元测算，5% 股权对应资金约 250 亿美元。这将是美国主权基金 2025 年 3 月成立以来首笔在 AI 领域的规模化投资，也是自 6 月中旬美国主权基金正式扩权、可投资私营 AI 企业以来的首次落地。这份股权收购与俄亥俄州派克顿 10GW 天然气发电项目、韩国 AI 内存芯片税收增量、Anthropic 三星 2 纳米自研芯片探索等一系列动作，共同构成 AI 产业本土化收拢的政策图景。
articles.summary_en: According to multiple sources from June 30, 2026, the US Sovereign Wealth Fund is in advanced talks to acquire approximately a 5% stake in OpenAI. At OpenAI's current ~$500B valuation, the 5% stake would be worth ~$25B. This would be the sovereign fund's first large-scale AI investment since its March 2025 creation, and the first landing since its authority was expanded in mid-June to invest in private AI firms. Combined with the Piketon Ohio 10 GW gas power project, Korea's AI memory chip tax incentives, and Anthropic's exploration of Samsung 2nm silicon, the deal completes the picture of AI industry re-shoring backed by state policy tools.
articles.source: Bloomberg / Reuters / 华尔街见闻 / 财联社 2026-06-30
articles.source_en: Bloomberg / Reuters / Wallstreetcn / Cailian Press 2026-06-30
articles.content: 美国主权基金收购 OpenAI 5% 股权若最终落地，将是美国政府第一次以主权资本直接绑定单一头部 AI 公司。这份操作与传统主权基金投资科技公司的最大差异在于：美国主权基金 2026 年 6 月扩权后，具有明确的「战略性行业保护 + 关键技术锁定」使命——不是纯财务回报导向，而是把 OpenAI 与美国政府基础设施投资进一步深度绑定。这与同一周软银 SB Neo 5000 亿美元派克顿项目、Anthropic Fable 5 剥离方案里「美国本土推理加价 1.1 倍」的条款，形成完整的政策协同——美国基础设施 + 美国资本 + 美国合规 + 美国推理，正在把 AI 尖端算力和最有价值的模型全面绑定到本土。市场关注的是这一操作的下一步：如果 OpenAI IPO 出现在 2026 下半年-2027 上半年，美国主权基金将成为最大单一非战略投资者之一。
articles.content_en: If completed, the US Sovereign Wealth Fund's 5% stake in OpenAI would be the first time the US government has directly tied sovereign capital to a single frontier AI company. Unlike traditional sovereign investments in tech companies, the fund's expanded mandate from June 2026 carries a clear "strategic industry protection + critical technology lock-in" mission — not purely financial returns, but deeper coupling of OpenAI to US government infrastructure investment. Combined with SoftBank's $500B Piketon project and the "US inference 1.1x" clause in the Fable 5 unbundling, a coherent policy stack emerges: US infrastructure + US capital + US compliance + US inference, systematically pulling frontier AI compute and the highest-value models back within US borders. Markets are watching the next step: if OpenAI IPOs in H2 2026 / H1 2027, the Sovereign Wealth Fund could become one of its largest non-strategic single investors.

按 5000 亿美元估值测算对应资金约 250 亿美元
主权基金 2026 年 3 月成立后首笔 AI 领域规模化投资
与派克顿 10GW / Anthropic 2nm / 韩国 AI 内存税收协同
构成 AI 产业本土化收拢的政策图景

Estimated $25B based on ~$500B valuation
First large-scale AI investment since fund's March 2026 creation
Synergy with Piketon 10 GW, Anthropic 2nm, Korea AI memory tax
Completes the picture of policy-backed AI re-shoring

articles.title: 俄亥俄州派克顿 10GW 天然气电厂第一阶段 800 兆瓦确认动工：AI 电力经济全面爆发
articles.title_en: Ohio Piketon 10 GW Gas Plant Phase-1 800 MW Confirmed Underway: AI Power Economy in Full Swing
articles.summary: 配套 SB Neo 数据中心项目的俄亥俄州派克顿天然气发电厂第一阶段 800 兆瓦已在 2026 年 6 月末完成前期地基作业、进入设备安装阶段。总投资规划约 330 亿美元、第一阶段投资 300-400 亿美元、目标 2028 年初完工。这是美国自 2010 年以来最大规模的一次天然气发电厂建设，也是「AI 电厂+算力园区一体化」模式在全球首次超大规模落地。俄亥俄州政府、美国商务部长 Howard Lutnick 与孙正义 3 月 20 日同场出席奠基仪式，为项目提供联邦级政策背书。同时段，宾夕法尼亚州、德克萨斯州、亚利桑那州的类似项目正在陆续启动。
articles.summary_en: The 800 MW phase-1 of the Piketon, Ohio gas-fired power plant supporting the SB Neo data center broke ground and entered equipment installation by end of June 2026. Total project: ~$33B; phase-1: $30-40B; target completion early 2028. This is the largest single US gas-fired power project since 2010, and the first hyperscale deployment globally of the "AI power plant + compute campus" integrated model. Ohio state government, US Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick, and Masayoshi Son appeared together at the March 20 groundbreaking, giving the project federal-level policy backing. Similar projects are now underway in Pennsylvania, Texas, and Arizona.
articles.source: Reuters / Bloomberg / 新浪财经 2026-07-02 / 华尔街见闻
articles.source_en: Reuters / Bloomberg / Sina Finance 2026-07-02 / Wallstreetcn
articles.content: 派克顿项目的能源模式代表了 AI 时代基础设施的新范式——「就地发电、就地供算」。10 吉瓦规模相当于 10 座百万千瓦级核电站的输出，一旦全面建成，将成为全球最大的 AI 专用能源基地。第一阶段 800 兆瓦是完整项目的开端，预计 2028 年初完工后可支撑约 500 兆瓦的算力负载。据俄亥俄州能源局公开数据，项目涉及的天然气管道扩建将横穿宾夕法尼亚州与俄亥俄州交界地区、总长约 220 公里，管道预算约 80 亿美元。当地就业估算：施工阶段峰值 12000 人，运营期长期就业 3000+ 人。这份大规模劳动力+资本+土地一体化投入，让派克顿成为 2026-2028 年美国中西部最重要的一份基础设施 megaproject——比 2010 年前后的页岩气开发投入规模更大、更集中。
articles.content_en: The Piketon project embodies a new infrastructure paradigm for the AI era: "generate power on site, serve compute on site." The 10 GW capacity is equivalent to 10 GW-class nuclear plants; once fully built, it would be the largest AI-dedicated energy hub globally. Phase-1 800 MW is the opening chapter; targeted completion in early 2028, supporting ~500 MW of compute load. Per Ohio Energy Board disclosures, the gas pipeline extension spans ~220 km across the Ohio-Pennsylvania border with an ~$8B pipeline budget. Local employment estimates: peak construction 12,000 workers, permanent operations 3,000+. This scale of labor + capital + land integration makes Piketon the most important infrastructure megaproject in the US Midwest for 2026-2028 — larger and more concentrated than the shale gas boom of the early 2010s.

articles.title: 央视 AI 特别节目 7 月 4 日晚黄金档播出：张亚勤、刘嘉共谈 AI 产业化路径
articles.title_en: CCTV Prime-Time AI Special on July 4: Yaqin Zhang and Jia Liu Discuss AI Industrialization
articles.summary: 2026 年 7 月 4 日晚黄金档，央视综合频道播出 AI 主题特别节目《下一个十年·AI 的中国路径》，由清华大学智能产业研究院院长张亚勤、清华大学脑与智能实验室主任刘嘉两位科学家共同接受专访。节目分两个 30 分钟单元：第一单元探讨中国大模型技术能力与产业化路径，第二单元探讨 AI 教育、AI 就业、AI 治理三大社会议题。这是央视自 2024 年 3 月《对话·AI 特别策划》之后，时隔 16 个月再次以黄金档规格制作 AI 主题深度节目——反映主流舆论对 AI 议题从「新技术介绍」升级为「战略产业深度讨论」的定位转变。
articles.summary_en: On the evening of July 4, 2026, CCTV-1 aired a prime-time AI special "The Next Decade: China's AI Path," featuring an interview with Yaqin Zhang, Dean of Tsinghua's Institute for AI Industry Research (AIR), and Jia Liu, Director of Tsinghua's Brain and Intelligence Lab. The program ran in two 30-minute segments: segment one on China's LLM capabilities and industrialization path, segment two on AI education, AI employment, and AI governance. This is CCTV's first prime-time AI deep-dive since March 2024's "Dialogue: AI Special" — signaling a shift in mainstream framing from "new tech intro" to "strategic industry discussion."
articles.source_en: CCTV-1 / Xinhua News 2026-07-05 / People's Daily Online 2026-07-05
articles.content: 张亚勤在节目中重点分享三份判断：其一，中国大模型技术能力已跻身全球第一梯队但仍存在「顶层能力差 15-25%、场景能力持平、工程能力反超」的三段差距；其二，中国 AI 产业化路径应聚焦「垂直行业深度渗透」而非追赶通用大模型参数规模——医疗、法律、金融、制造是最有可能率先跑通商业闭环的四条主线；其三，未来 12 个月是国内头部大模型公司「首批 IPO 潮」的关键窗口，将改变一级市场的估值锚。刘嘉从脑科学角度切入 AI 意识与 AGI 议题——她认为 2026-2030 年 AI 与人脑的功能对齐仍处于早期，「Multimodal + 具身 + Long Context」是未来 3 年最关键的三条技术主线，但通用人工智能（AGI）短期内不会实现。节目最后二人共谈 AI 教育与 AI 就业冲击——张亚勤呼吁「让所有大学生都学 AI 基础课」，刘嘉呼吁「教育部推进 AI 通识教育纳入义务教育阶段」。
articles.content_en: In the program, Yaqin Zhang shared three key judgments: (1) Chinese LLMs are now in the global first tier, but a three-tier gap remains — top-line capability 15-25% behind, scenario capability at parity, engineering capability ahead; (2) China's AI industrialization should focus on vertical industry penetration rather than chasing general-model parameter counts — healthcare, law, finance, and manufacturing are the four most likely to close a commercial loop first; (3) the next 12 months are the critical window for China's first LLM IPO wave, which will re-anchor primary-market valuations. From a brain-science angle, Jia Liu framed AI consciousness and AGI: functional alignment between AI and the human brain remains early through 2026-2030; "Multimodal + Embodied + Long Context" are the three most critical technical tracks over the next three years, but AGI will not materialize in the short term. Both closed by urging "AI foundational courses for all college students" (Zhang) and "AI general education integrated into K-9" (Liu).

张亚勤、刘嘉两位科学家共同接受专访

刘嘉：Multimodal + 具身 + Long Context 未来 3 年三条主线
呼吁 AI 通识教育纳入大学与义务教育阶段

Interview with Yaqin Zhang and Jia Liu, two Tsinghua scientists

articles.title: Meta 与 CoreWeave 签订 210 亿美元 GPU 算力长约：H200/GB200 混合部署
articles.title_en: Meta Signs $21B GPU Compute Long-Term Deal with CoreWeave: H200/GB200 Hybrid Deployment
articles.summary: 2026 年 7 月 3 日，Meta 与 GPU 云服务商 CoreWeave 官宣签订约 210 亿美元的长期算力供应协议，合同期 6 年、覆盖 H200 与 GB200 混合部署超过 8 万张 GPU 等值算力。这是 CoreWeave 上市以来单笔最大合同、也是 2026 年上半年全球最大规模的 GPU 云采购。Meta 此次采购主要用于 Llama 5 后继模型的训练与其 AI 推荐系统的推理扩容——Meta AI 平台过去 12 个月月活突破 22 亿，推荐系统的推理算力需求同比翻 2.5 倍。CoreWeave 股价当日盘后大涨 12%，此份合同将其未来 6 年可预见收入锁定在 210 亿美元级别。
articles.summary_en: On July 3, 2026, Meta and GPU cloud provider CoreWeave announced a ~$21B long-term compute supply agreement — a 6-year contract covering H200 and GB200 hybrid deployment equivalent to over 80,000 GPUs. This is CoreWeave's largest single contract since its IPO and the largest GPU cloud procurement globally in H1 2026. Meta will use the compute mainly for training Llama 5's successor models and scaling its AI recommendation system inference — Meta AI's platform monthly actives surpassed 2.2B over the past 12 months, and recommendation-system inference demand has grown 2.5x YoY. CoreWeave stock rose 12% after-hours, and the deal locks its foreseeable 6-year revenue at ~$21B.
articles.source: Reuters / Bloomberg / The Information 2026-07-03 / CoreWeave 官方公告
articles.source_en: Reuters / Bloomberg / The Information 2026-07-03 / CoreWeave Newsroom
articles.content: 这份 210 亿美元合同背后有三重博弈：其一，Meta 之前 90% GPU 算力自建自采（Facebook AI Research Cluster 与 Meta Superintelligence Cluster），首次把大规模算力外包给 CoreWeave 是「训推分离 + 边际外包」的战略调整；其二，CoreWeave 之所以能拿到这份订单，核心是其在英伟达全球 GPU 供应链上的优先权——CoreWeave 2025 年是英伟达第 3 大 GPU 客户；其三，Meta 此举与其接下来的机器人业务扩张深度相关——Meta 2026 年 6 月官宣的具身智能子公司 MetaBody 将在派克顿类似能源基地部署 5000 台机器人训练集群，需要低延迟高密度算力。合同定价折合每 GPU 每小时约 3.2 美元（含托管+电力+网络），比同期 AWS/Azure 的 P5d/ND H200 v5 实例的公开牌价低 25-30%——是长期锁量+批量集采带来的规模溢价。
articles.content_en: Three dynamics behind this $21B deal: (1) Meta previously ran ~90% of its GPU compute in-house (Facebook AI Research Cluster and Meta Superintelligence Cluster). Outsourcing at this scale to CoreWeave is a strategic shift toward "train-inference split + marginal outsourcing"; (2) CoreWeave won this order because of its priority position in Nvidia's global GPU supply chain — CoreWeave was Nvidia's 3rd-largest GPU customer in 2025; (3) The deal ties directly into Meta's robotics expansion — MetaBody, Meta's embodied AI subsidiary announced in June 2026, will deploy a 5,000-unit robotics training cluster at a Piketon-class energy site requiring low-latency high-density compute. Contract pricing works out to ~$3.2 per GPU-hour (bundled with hosting, power, network), roughly 25-30% below AWS P5d and Azure ND H200 v5 list prices at the same time — the scale premium of long-term lock-in and bulk procurement.
